abilities.name: Earth Glide
abilities.effect_text: An aeolaeka can Burrow through any earthen matter, including rock. When they do so, the aeolaeka moves at their full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of their passing.

abilities.name: Liberate the Earth
abilities.effect_text: The aeolaeka conjures churning stones, creating a @Template[line|distance:60] of rolling boulders. Creatures in the line take @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:35|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save. The area is difficult terrain for 24 hours before the leftover stone crumbles to dust. The aeolaeka can't Liberate the Earth for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Liberate the Earth]]{1d4 rounds}. Critical Success The creature takes no damage. Success The creature takes half damage. Failure The creature takes full damage and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]. Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is knocked prone, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] by the rubble ([[/act escape dc=32]]).

abilities.name: Statue
abilities.effect_text: Until the next time they act, the aeolaeka appears to be a statue. They have an automatic result of 45 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a statue.

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: divine | innate

abilities.name: At-Will Spells
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AtWillSpells]

abilities.name: All-Around Vision
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AllAroundVision]

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Archon's Protection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger An enemy damages the archon's ally and both are within 15 feet of the archon Effect The ally gains resistance 10 to all damage against the triggering damage and the archon can make a Strike against the enemy.

abilities.name: Flame of Justice
abilities.effect_text: An aesra's spirit of righteousness manifests as a two-handed sword of fire. If disarmed or thrown as a ranged weapon, the flame of justice vanishes after landing or dealing damage and reappears in the aesra's hands again instantly. On a critical hit, the target also takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] damage.

abilities.name: Flaming Slash
abilities.effect_text: The aesra sweeps their sword, creating a @Template[cone|distance:15] of sacred flame that deals @Damage[5d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:23|basic|options:area-effect] save.

abilities.name: Maintain Formation
abilities.effect_text: When an aesra casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Translocate], they can bring an adjacent willing archon along with them. That archon appears in an empty space adjacent to the aesra's new space.

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: divine | innate

abilities.name: Fog Vision
abilities.effect_text: The air scamp ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition from fog and mist.

abilities.name: Fast Healing 2 (In Open Air)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FastHealing]

abilities.name: Sirocco Breath
abilities.effect_text: The air scamp creates cutting winds in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deal @Damage[2d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails its save is also pushed back 10 feet. The air scamp can't use Sirocco Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Sirocco Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Arcane Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: arcane | innate

abilities.name: Elemental Field
abilities.effect_text: The elementalist unleashes powerful static electricity in a @Template[emanation|distance:20] that lasts for 1 minute. All squares in the area become hazardous terrain for other creatures. A creature takes @Damage[1[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage each time it moves into one of these squares. While in the area, creatures take a –1 status penalty to saves against electricity spells. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Elemental Field]

abilities.name: Elf Step
abilities.effect_text: The elementalist Steps twice.

abilities.name: Arcane Prepared Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: arcane | prepared

abilities.name: Envisioning
abilities.effect_text: 100 feet An akhana can communicate mentally with any creatures in the aura using wordless psychic projections. They don't need to share a language, though the aeon's meaning to non-aeons can be vague and is often mysterious. An aeon can use this ability to communicate flawlessly with any other aeon on the same plane as itself.

abilities.name: Lifesense 120 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

abilities.name: At-Will Spells
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AtWillSpells]

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Balance Life
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within 100 feet is about to attempt a recovery check Effect The akhana chooses to make the result a success or failure (but not a critical success or failure). This effect gains the fortune trait if the akhana chooses success or misfortune for failure.

abilities.name: Flying Fists
abilities.effect_text: The akhana Flies and makes up to four fist Strikes against different targets at any points during this movement. The attacks count toward its multiple attack penalty normally, but the penalty does not increase until after Flying Fists is complete.

abilities.name: Reclaim Life
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The akhana has a living creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] with its tail Effect The creature takes 4d10 void damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:32|basic] save. On a failed save, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 1}. If the creature dies while doomed and held in the akhana's tail, its soul is trapped in the akhana (as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Seize Soul]), and its remains are preserved as peaceful rest. The soul returns to the body with 1 Hit Point if the akhana @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dismiss]{Dismisses} the effect, if the akhana is slain, or if a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wish] ritual or similarly powerful magic frees it.

abilities.name: Sprout Life
abilities.effect_text: A @Template[burst|distance:5] within 100 feet fills with simple life appropriate to the environment. The newly forged animals bite those in the area for @Damage[7d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:32|basic|options:area-effect] save. The akhana can also have fungus or plants choke the area, even floating ones in the sky, creating difficult terrain. The created life lives or dies normally after its creation.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: divine | innate

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.effect_text: The alce Strides and makes a talon Strike at the end of that movement. If the alce began this action @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden], it remains hidden until after the attack.

abilities.name: Regal Shriek
abilities.effect_text: The alce unleashes a shriek that transitions into a terrifying roar. Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:60] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20] save. Regardless of the result, creatures are temporarily immune to all griffons' Regal Shrieks for 10 minutes. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Animals are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for as long as they're frightened. Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3}. Animals are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] as long as they're frightened.

abilities.name: Construct Armor (Hardness 9)
abilities.effect_text: Like normal objects, an animated armor has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once an animated armor is reduced to less than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks and its Armor Class is reduced to 13.

abilities.name: Construct Armor (Hardness 2)
abilities.effect_text: Like normal objects, an animated broom has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once an animated broom is reduced to less than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks and reducing its Armor Class to 13.

abilities.name: Dust
abilities.effect_text: A creature hit by an animated broom's bristles must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or spend its next action coughing. Even if hit by multiple dust attacks, the creature has to spend only 1 action coughing to clear the dust out. A creature that doesn't breathe is immune to this effect.

abilities.name: Construct Armor (Hardness 6)

abilities.name: Change Shape

When the barghest is a humanoid, their claw Strike deals bludgeoning damage and they lose their jaws Strike. When the barghest is a dog, their Speed changes to 35 feet. Each individual barghest has only one humanoid form and one dog form. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Unhealing Wound
abilities.effect_text: A creature damaged by the barghest's claws must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save or be cursed. The cursed creature can't regain Hit Points except via magic until it returns to maximum Hit Points. The creature can attempt a new saving throw against the curse every 24 hours.

abilities.name: Knockdown

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells

abilities.name: Petrifying Glance
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. Trigger A creature within 30 feet that the basilisk can see starts its turn. Effect The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20|options:inflicts:slowed] save. If it fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute as its body slowly stiffens.

abilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
abilities.effect_text: The basilisk stares at a creature it can see within 30 feet. That creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:22|options:inflicts:slowed,inflicts:petrified] save. If it fails and has not already been slowed by Petrifying Glance or this ability, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1}. If the creature was already slowed by this ability or Petrifying Glance, a failed save causes the creature to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Petrified] permanently. A creature petrified in this manner that is coated (not just splashed) with fresh basilisk blood no more than 1 hour old is instantly restored to flesh. A single basilisk contains enough blood to coat [[/gmr 1d4 #Medium Creatures]] Medium creatures in this manner.

abilities.name: Tremorsense (Imprecise) 100 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

abilities.name: Inexorable
abilities.effect_text: The benthic worm recovers from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned] conditions at the end of its turn. It's also immune to penalties to its Speeds and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] condition, and it ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

abilities.name: Slough Skin
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Trigger The benthic worm would be affected by a condition or adverse effect (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cursed Metamorphosis]) Effect The benthic worm negates the triggering condition or effect by sloughing an outer layer of its skin. Effects from artifacts, deities, or a similarly powerful source can't be avoided in this way.

abilities.name: Benthic Worm Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:37] Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and clumsy 2 (1 round) Stage 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and clumsy 2 (1 round)

abilities.name: Breach
abilities.effect_text: The benthic worm Swims up to its swim Speed, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Leap]{Leaps} vertically out of the water up to 30 feet, making a Strike against a creature at the apex of the jump (this lets it attack a creature within 45 feet of the water's surface). After the Strike, the worm splashes back down. It can use @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Improved Grab] on this Strike and follow it up with Fast Swallow.

abilities.name: Fast Swallow
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The worm @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed]{Grabs} a creature. Effect The worm uses Swallow Whole.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.effect_text: Huge, @Damage[(3d8+10)[bludgeoning]], Rupture 27 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

abilities.name: Thrash
abilities.effect_text: The worm makes a Strike once against each creature in its reach. It can Strike up to once with its jaws, up to once with its stinger, and any number of times with its body. Each attack counts toward the worm's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all the attacks.

abilities.name: Swamp Passage
abilities.effect_text: A boggard scout ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features.

abilities.name: Terrifying Croak
abilities.effect_text: The boggard scout unleashes a terrifying croak. Any non-boggard within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} unless they succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17] save; those who critically succeed are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Tongue Grab
abilities.effect_text: If the boggard scout hits a creature with their tongue, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] by the boggard. Unlike with a normal Grab, the creature isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized], but it can't move beyond the reach of the boggard's tongue. A creature can sever the tongue by hitting AC 13 and dealing at least 2 slashing damage. Though this doesn't deal any damage to the boggard, it prevents them from using their tongue Strike until they regrow their tongue, which takes a week.

abilities.name: Destructive Croak
abilities.effect_text: The swampseer utters a powerful croak that deals @Damage[4d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage to any non-boggard within a @Template[emanation|distance:15] (@Check[fortitude|dc:19|basic|options:area-effect] save); any creature with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] condition takes additional sonic damage equal to twice the value of its frightened condition. The boggard can't use Destructive Croak again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Destructive Croak]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Drowning Drone
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The boggard swampseer or one of their allies within 60 feet attempts a saving throw against an auditory or sonic effect Effect The swampseer releases a croak that drowns out other sounds. They roll a @Check[performance] check. They and boggard allies in the area can use the higher result between the swampseer's Performance check and their saves to resolve the effects against the auditory or sonic effect.

abilities.name: Swamp Passage
abilities.effect_text: A boggard swampseer ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features.

abilities.name: Terrifying Croak

abilities.name: Raise Serpent

Any flesh on the bodies sloughs off, and they rise as skeletons. The bone prophet can raise one Large creature as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Skeletal Giant] or up to three Medium creatures as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Skeletal Champion]{Skeletal Champions}; the equipment and attacks might be different depending on the corpses' possessions. These skeletons have the minion trait and are under the bone prophet's control; the bone prophet can give all these minions the same command with a single action that has the concentrate trait. Any skeletal minions that still remain after 10 minutes crumble to dust.

The brimorak can't use Frothing Spew again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Frothing Spew]]{1d4 rounds}.

All creatures within the smoke become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and all creatures outside the smoke become concealed to creatures within it. A creature that enters or begins its turn within the smoke it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

abilities.name: Soul Lock
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The cacodaemon ingests the soul of a sentient creature within 30 feet that died within the last minute. When they do, the cacodaemon grows a fist-sized soul gem (Hardness 2, HP 8) in their gut and can regurgitate it at any time as an Interact action. Destroying the gem frees the soul within but doesn't return the deceased creature to life. If a caster attempts to return to life a creature whose soul is trapped within a soul gem, they fail unless they succeed at a @Check[religion|dc:30] check. A success causes the soul gem to shatter so the creature is returned to life as normal for the spell. A fiend can Interact to ingest a soul gem it is holding, condemning the soul to the fiend's home plane. The fiend gains fast healing 5 for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Soul Lock (Healing)]

This movement doesn't trigger reactions, and the caldera oni can move through small gaps and spaces occupied by other creatures. The caldera oni then returns to its physical form, affected by a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Enlarge] spell with a duration of [[/gmr 1d4 #Ash Form Duration]]{1d4 rounds}.

The oni then finishes the dance by calling down volcanic lightning through the cloud of ash. Each creature hit by a Strike during the dance takes @Damage[3d6[fire],3d6[electricity]]{3d6 fire damage and 3d6 electricity damage} with a @Check[reflex|dc:34|basic] save.

If no target is in reach or range, or the creature is unable to Strike for any other reason, this ability has no effect.

Each creature within @Template[emanation|distance:120] that can hear the cauthooj must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save to resist the effect. Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused] for 1 round and immediately attacks itself (in the normal fashion for attacking oneself while confused). This Strike doesn't give the creature a flat check to recover from the confusion.

abilities.name: Slough Skin

The Strike deals bludgeoning damage depending on the size of the projectile: Tiny @Damage[(2d6+13)[bludgeoning]]{2d6+13} Small @Damage[(3d6+13)[bludgeoning]]{3d6+13} Medium @Damage[(4d6+13)[bludgeoning]]{4d6+13} Large @Damage[(5d6+13)[bludgeoning]]{5d6+13} Huge @Damage[(6d6+13)[bludgeoning]]{6d6+13} A regurgitated creature takes falling damage from the height of the target or from 20 feet, whichever is greater. Boulders occupy space in the worm's stomach as a creature of equivalent size, and purple worms often have several boulders swallowed. A purple worm can use a single action to swallow a new boulder.

abilities.name: Draconic Bite

This ability gains the related traits. The chimera can't use Dragon Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. Arcane @Template[line|distance:60] of @Damage[9d6[force]|options:area-damage]{force} (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect]) Divine @Template[line|distance:60] of @Damage[9d6[spirit]|options:area-damage]{spirit} (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect]); this ability can also have the holy or unholy trait Occult @Template[cone|distance:30] of @Damage[9d6[mental]|options:area-damage]{mental} (@Check[will|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect]) Primal @Template[cone|distance:30] of @Damage[9d6[acid]|options:area-damage]{acid}, @Damage[9d6[cold]|options:area-damage]{cold}, @Damage[9d6[electricity]|options:area-damage]{electricity}, @Damage[9d6[fire]|options:area-damage]{fire}, or @Damage[9d6[sonic]|options:area-damage]{sonic} (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect]); or @Damage[9d6[poison]|options:area-damage]{poison} (@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect])

Critical Failure As failure, except the persistent damage is increased to @Damage[6d6[persistent,spirit]].

abilities.name: Calcification
abilities.effect_text: A peck from a cockatrice hardens the flesh of the creature struck. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20|inflicts:slowed,inflicts:petrified] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure). Further failed saves against calcification increase the slowed condition. Once a creature's actions are reduced to 0 by calcification, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Petrified]. If the creature isn't petrified, the slowed conditions end once 1 minute passes without the creature failing a save against calcification. Every 24 hours after it was petrified, the victim can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save to recover. On a success, it becomes flesh again, but is slowed 1 for the next 24 hours. On a critical success, the creature recovers and isn't slowed. On a failure, the creature remains petrified but can try again in 24 hours. On a critical failure, the petrification is permanent, and the creature can't attempt any more saves.

Coil spies typically seek privacy when they need to sleep, as an ongoing illusory disguise ends an hour after they fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious].

abilities.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult
Retract Body
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The dragon is hit or critically hit by an attack made by a creature the dragon can see Effect The dragon retracts the targeted body part or twists away to avoid the attack, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

abilities.name: Conjure Disguise
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The dragon conjures a perfect flesh-suit replica of a humanoid they've seen of their size or smaller and compresses themself into it, along with generating appropriate clothing for the humanoid. This process takes 1 minute to complete, during which the dragon is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard]. If the dragon stops or is interrupted in this process, the suit is destroyed. Once the process is complete, the dragon can remain in this disguise indefinitely. The transformation has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Change Shape], except that the disguise is not actively magical in nature and doesn't register as magical to detect magic and similar effects. The dragon loses Retract Body while transformed. If the dragon is critically hit while wearing the disguise, the suit is destroyed and immediately explodes. This has the effects of Detonate Disguise, except that creatures use the outcome one degree of success better than they rolled on their save.

abilities.name: Detonate Disguise
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon is wearing their conjured disguise Effect The dragon erupts from the disguise, destroying it. The explosive revelation deals @Damage[13d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|dc:31|basic|options:area-effect] save. A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round as it becomes covered in scraps from the disguise. Any creature sharing a space with the dragon after they erupt is pushed into the nearest empty space.

abilities.name: Rushed Transformation
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per hour Effect Using the aid of magic and an exhausting amount of effort, the dragon quickly reshapes their body into the form of a generic humanoid figure. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Humanoid Form] except that it lasts only 1 minute, and the dragon doesn't gain the +4 status bonus to Deception as the transformation makes use of the dragon's body to crudely mimic a humanoid form. The dragon can Dismiss the effect. Whenever the effect ends, the dragon leaves behind scraps of magically conjured flesh, which could give away the dragon's presence.

abilities.name: Smoke Breath

Regeneration 10 (Deactivated by Cold Iron)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

abilities.name: Curse of Fire
abilities.effect_text: When a creature slays the crag linnorm, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:35] save or gain weakness to fire 15 with an unlimited duration. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Curse of Fire]

abilities.name: Reactive Strike (Tail Only)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.effect_text: @Damage[(2d6+14)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:34|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

abilities.name: Crag Linnorm Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]; Maximum Duration 10 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} (1 round)

abilities.name: Magma Breath
abilities.effect_text: The crag linnorm breathes out a stream of magma in a @Template[line|distance:120] that deals @Damage[12d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic|options:area-effect] save). Any creature that fails its save also takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]] damage. The linnorm can't use Magma Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Magma Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. The magma remains until the start of the linnorm's next turn. If the linnorm was on the ground, the magma remains as a burning line on the ground directly under the line of the Magma Breath; if the linnorm was airborne, the magma rains down in a sheet 60 feet high. Any creature that moves across or through the magma takes @Damage[6d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic] save). At the start of the linnorm's next turn, the magma cools to a thin layer of brittle stone, or the magma rain finishes falling and turns to harmless pebbles. The cooled magma quickly degrades to powder and sand over the course of several hours.

abilities.name: Improved Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ImprovedGrab]

abilities.name: Primal Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: primal | innate

abilities.name: Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

abilities.name: Lifesense 30 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Mark Quarry
abilities.effect_text: A crawling hand can be assigned a quarry by anointing the hand with a drop of the intended quarry's blood. If the hand ever has no quarry, it automatically gains the next creature it damages as its quarry. The hand gains a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks when it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek]{Seeks} its quarry, to Survival checks when it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Track]{Tracks} its quarry, and damage rolls when it Strikes its quarry.

abilities.name: Throat Grab
abilities.effect_text: This ability functions as Grab, but the crawling hand grips the throat of a Medium or smaller creature. A creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] this way has difficulty speaking and must spend an extra action to perform any action that requires speaking, including casting spells. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Deep Breath
abilities.effect_text: The crocodile can hold its breath for about 2 hours.

abilities.name: Aquatic Ambush
abilities.effect_text: 35 feet @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AquaticAmbush]

abilities.name: Death Roll
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The crocodile must have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] Effect The crocodile tucks its legs and rolls rapidly, twisting its victim. It makes a jaws Strike with a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll against the grabbed creature. If it hits, it also knocks the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]. If it fails, it releases the creature.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Coven
abilities.effect_text: A cuckoo hag adds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dominate], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Nightmare], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Outcast's Curse], and scrying to their coven's spells. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Sound Imitation
abilities.effect_text: A cuckoo hag who succeeds at a Deception check to Lie can mimic the sound of any feminine voice they have heard (in cases where this may be unclear, the GM is the final arbiter) and have a +4 circumstance bonus to this check.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The cuckoo hag can take on the appearance of any Medium female humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Cuckoo's Lair
abilities.effect_text: A cuckoo hag is intrinsically connected to a pocket dimension that serves as their home domain. The lair is an extradimensional space that is 40 feet wide, 40 feet deep, and 30 feet tall. It contains whatever mundane food, buildings, landscapes, and objects that the cuckoo hag desires, though anything removed from the cuckoo's lair dissolves into nothingness instantly. In order to enter or leave the plane, the cuckoo hag must create a door in the physical world as a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits. The door is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] by default, though the cuckoo hag can choose a target creature that can perceive the door normally. The cuckoo hag can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dismiss] this door from reality, but only if they (and no other creature) are inside of their lair and alone.

abilities.name: Soul Covenant
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The cuckoo hag can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Seize Soul] at will, but only to target a creature who has agreed to stay with them forever. They typically do so as soon as the agreement is made but might hold off to gain leverage over a situation. They typically place the soul into a construct, typically a soulbound doll if they want a companion or a more powerful construct if they want a guardian.

abilities.name: Occult Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Coven Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Ferocity
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Ferocity]

abilities.name: Flash of Insight
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day. Trigger The cyclops is about to roll a d20. Effect The cyclops peers into an occluded spectrum of possible futures. It gets a success (but not a critical success) on the roll instead of rolling.

abilities.name: Swipe
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Effect The cyclops makes a melee Strike and compares the attack roll result to the AC of up to two foes, each of whom must be within their melee reach and adjacent to each other. Roll damage only once and apply it to each creature hit. A Swipe counts as two attacks for the cyclops's multiple attack penalty.

abilities.name: Telepathy (Touch Only)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Telepathy]

abilities.name: Sickening Display
abilities.effect_text: The cythnigot presents its awful appearance fully, and creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:17] save. Once a creature attempts this save, it's temporarily immune to further Sickening Displays for 1 minute. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] until its next turn. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} and is off-guard for as long as it's sickened. Critical Failure As failure but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}.

abilities.name: Tangle Spores
abilities.effect_text: A creature bitten by a cythnigot becomes afflicted by fast-growing spores that swiftly grow into twitching spikes and hideous pallid growths of hairlike fibers. These growths erupt from the bite wound and writhe and wrap around the creature's limbs. Plant creatures take a –2 circumstance penalty to save against tangle spores Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:17]; Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} (1 round) Stage 2 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] (1 round) Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}, off-guard, and if you attempt a manipulate action, you must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] or it's lost; roll the check after spending the action, but before any effects are applied (1 round).

abilities.name: Occult Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Ferocity
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Ferocity]

abilities.name: Daeodon Charge
abilities.effect_text: The daeodon Strides twice and then makes a tusk Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its attack roll. A Medium or smaller creature struck by this attack must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:19] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] by the force of the blow.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.effect_text: The deadly mantis flings a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] creature into the air, up to 30 feet overhead and up to 30 feet away from the mantis (the creature takes damage from the fall as normal). If the flung creature lands on another creature, the creature it lands on takes the same amount of bludgeoning damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:31|basic] save.

abilities.name: Leaping Grab
abilities.effect_text: The mantis Leaps up to 40 feet vertically and 20 feet horizontally. At any point during the jump, it can make a leg Strike. If it hits, it automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Grab]{Grabs} the target, bringing the creature along until the end of the jump.

abilities.name: Rending Mandibles
abilities.effect_text: The mantis makes a mandibles Strike against a creature it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed]. If that Strike hits and the creature is wearing armor with Hardness 12 or lower, the armor is broken. This Strike doesn't further damage armor that's already broken.

abilities.name: Sudden Strike
abilities.effect_text: On the first round of combat, creatures that haven't acted are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to the deadly mantis.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Darting Strike
abilities.effect_text: The deinonychus Strides up to 10 feet and then makes a Strike, or makes a Strike and then Strides up to 10 feet.

abilities.name: Predator's Advantage
abilities.effect_text: Bleeding creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to the deinonychus.

abilities.name: Deep Breath
abilities.effect_text: A deinosuchus can hold its breath for about 2 hours.

abilities.name: Aquatic Ambush
abilities.effect_text: 50 feet @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AquaticAmbush]

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.effect_text: Large, @Damage[(2d8+7)[bludgeoning]], Rupture 18 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Vulnerable to Sunlight
abilities.effect_text: A dero magister takes @Damage[10[untyped]] damage for every hour they're exposed to sunlight.

abilities.name: Cytillesh Stare
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Effect The magister focuses their gaze on a creature they can see within 30 feet. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round and must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:24] saving throw or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused] for 1 round.

abilities.name: Dero Medicine
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dero is wearing a cytillesh toolkit and has a hand free Effect The dero excises damaged flesh and crudely stitches wounds shut, healing themself or an ally in reach for @Damage[(2d8+10)[healing]]{2d8+10 Hit Points}. For 1 hour, the target has slashing weakness 2 and is immune to Dero Medicine. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Dero Medicine]

abilities.name: Exploit Lethargy
abilities.effect_text: A creature afflicted with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Lethargy Poison] is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to the dero stalker, and the stalker can choose to add the nonlethal trait to their attacks against the creature without taking the normal penalty.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.effect_text: A dero stalker deals 1d6 extra precision damage to creatures who are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard].

abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Ill Glow
abilities.effect_text: A non-dero living creature that starts its turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] by the strangler is exposed to the sickly blue light from the strangler's cytillesh toolkit. It must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1}. This has no effect if the strangler isn't wearing the toolkit.

abilities.name: Vulnerable to Sunlight
abilities.effect_text: A dero strangler takes @Damage[8[untyped]] damage for every hour they're exposed to sunlight.

abilities.name: Dero Medicine
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dero is wearing a cytillesh toolkit and has a hand free Effect The dero excises damaged flesh and crudely stitches wounds shut, healing themself or an ally in reach for @Damage[2d8[healing]]{2d8 Hit Points}. For 1 hour, the target has slashing weakness 2 and is immune to Dero Medicine. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Dero Medicine]

abilities.name: Strangle
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dero must have two free hands or be wielding a spiked chain Effect The dero attempts an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Grapple] with a +2 circumstance bonus. On a success, the target also takes @Damage[(1d6+6)[bludgeoning]] damage and can't speak (including to Cast a Spell) as long as they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained].

abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Sandstorm Sight
abilities.effect_text: Sandstorms don't impair a desert drake's vision; they ignore @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} from sandstorms. They also are immune to being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] by sand or other grit.

abilities.name: Wing Deflection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The desert drake is targeted with an attack Effect The desert drake raises their wing, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the desert drake is flying at the time they're attacked, they descend 10 feet after the attack is complete.

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The desert drake makes two Fangs Strikes and one Tail Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Sandstorm Breath
abilities.effect_text: The desert drake spits a ball of abrasive sand with a range of 60 feet that explodes into a cloud with a @Template[burst|distance:15]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[9d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect] save). The desert drake can't use Sandstorm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d6 #Recharge Sandstorm Breath]]{1d6 rounds}, during which the sandstorm lingers in the area. This lingering sandstorm grants @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} to everything within it and conceals everything outside from them.

abilities.name: Speed Surge
abilities.effect_text: Frequency three times per day Effect The desert drake Strides or Flies twice.

abilities.name: Surprise Attacker
abilities.effect_text: On the first round of combat, creatures that haven't acted yet are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] to the desert drake.

abilities.name: Push
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Push]

abilities.name: Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Fire)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. @Check[fortitude|dc:27|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Stench]

abilities.name: Amnesia Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:29] Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] (1 round) Stage 2 off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} (1 round) Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused], off-guard, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} (1 round) Stage 4 as Stage 3 and permanently forget the last hour (1 round)

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.effect_text: @Damage[(2d6+2)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

abilities.name: Root
abilities.effect_text: Until the next time it acts, the dezullon appears to be a normal pitcher plant. It has an automatic result of 41 (44 in forests or swamps) on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a non-creature plant.

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.effect_text: The dhampir's penalty and Hit Point reduction from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained] condition are reduced as though the condition value were 1 lower.

abilities.effect_text: Trigger The dragon is critically hit with a melee attack Effect The dragon channels the rancor of Hell back through the body of their foe, overwhelming it with an infernal assault on the mind. The triggering creature takes @Damage[8d6[mental]] damage with a @Check[will|dc:36|basic] save. Holy creatures use an outcome one degree of success worse than they roll on their saving throw.

abilities.name: Diabolic Fire
abilities.effect_text: Any fire damage that a diabolic dragon deals, including fire damage from spells, is imbued with the unholy power of Hell to scorch the spirit as well. A creature takes spirit damage instead of fire damage if that would be more detrimental to the creature (as determined by the GM). A diabolic dragon is immune to the diabolic fire of other diabolic dragons, the fire from divine immolation, and similar effects.

abilities.effect_text: The dragon unleashes a blast of infernal fire that deals @Damage[16d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:50] (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect] save). The dragon can't use Hellfire Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hellfire Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Mirage Spores
abilities.effect_text: 300 feet. The sargassum heap constantly produces a field of hallucinogenic spores that causes those affected to see the monster as whatever they desire most. Each creature within the emanation must succeed a @Check[will|dc:27] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fascinated] with the sargassum heap and compelled to move toward it on the creature's turn. Creatures fascinated this way are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard]. If the sargassum heap attacks, the fascinated condition ends only for the creature that is attacked. On a successful save, a creature is temporarily immune to mirage spores for 24 hours.

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.effect_text: @Damage[(1d12+10)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

abilities.name: Draw In
abilities.effect_text: The doldrums heap attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Reposition] up to three creatures it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained]. These attempts neither apply nor count toward the heap's multiple attack penalty. It can move them into its own space, dealing @Damage[(1d12+10)[bludgeoning]] damage.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Shell Block
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature adjacent to the dragon turtle targets it with a melee attack. Effect The dragon turtle rolls its shell toward the triggering creature, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

abilities.name: Capsize
abilities.effect_text: The dragon turtle tries to capsize an adjacent aquatic vessel of their size or smaller. The dragon turtle must succeed at a @Check[athletics|dc:30] check (reduce the DC by 5 for each size smaller than the dragon turtle) or the pilot's Sailing Lore DC, whichever is higher.

abilities.name: Conjure Storm
abilities.effect_text: The dragon turtle summons a mighty storm to rage around themself. The area in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] around the turtle becomes difficult terrain for all other flying and swimming creatures. The dragon turtle can end the storm by taking this action again.

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The dragon turtle makes two Claw Strikes and one Jaws Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Tsunami
abilities.effect_text: The dragon turtle unleashes their destructive prowess by creating a massive growing wave that deals @Damage[7d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:prone] save). The wave's damage increases by 10 for creatures who are more than 30 feet away. A creature that fails its save is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]. The dragon turtle can't use Tsunami again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Tsunami]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Telepathy (Touch)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Telepathy]

abilities.name: Draxie Dust
abilities.effect_text: The draxie breathes magical dust in a @Template[cone|distance:15]. Roll [[/r 1d4]] to determine the effect. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17] save or be affected. The draxie can't use Draxie Dust again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Draxie Dust]]{1d4 rounds}. The target takes the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Charm] spell. The target loses its last 5 minutes of memory. The target takes the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sleep] spell. For 1 minute, the target is in a state of euphoria that makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1}.

abilities.name: Primal Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: primal | innate

abilities.name: Ferocity
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Ferocity]

abilities.name: Tangle Prey
abilities.effect_text: The dromaar draws a bola and Strikes a target within 20 feet. On a success, the dromaar immediately rolls an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the target's Fortitude DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Trip] them.

abilities.name: Nature Empathy
abilities.effect_text: The dryad can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals and plants.

abilities.name: Tied to the Land
abilities.effect_text: The dryad queen is tied to a forest or other woodland. A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific region. As long as the queen is healthy, the environment is exceptionally resilient, allowing the nymph queen to automatically attempt to counteract any spell that would harm the environment (such as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blight] ritual), using her spell DC with a counteract rank equal to the highest-rank druid spell she can cast. When the nymph queen becomes physically or psychologically unhealthy, however, her warded region eventually becomes twisted or unhealthy as well. In that case, restoring the nymph queen swiftly heals the entire region.

abilities.name: Constant Spells
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ConstantSpells]

abilities.name: Nymph's Beauty
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. On a failed save, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] in awe for 1 minute. Creatures that start their turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:30|options:area-effect,inflicts:immobilized] save or suffer an effect described in the nymph queen's entry.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a more humanoid-looking version of their natural form. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Focus Beauty
abilities.effect_text: On a failed save, if the target was already affected by the dryad queen's beauty, the target can't use hostile actions against the dryad queen for 1 hour. The nymph queen focuses her beauty upon a target, who must attempt a save against her nymph's beauty aura (@Check[will|dc:30] save). If the creature fails and was already affected by the aura, it takes a greater effect described in the nymph queen's entry. A nymph queen can Focus Beauty on a given creature only once per turn.

abilities.name: Inspiration
abilities.effect_text: The nymph queen inspires a single intelligent creature by giving that creature a token of her favor, typically a lock of her hair, though it can be some other significant object as well. As long as the creature carries her token and remains in good standing with her, the creature gains a +1 status bonus to all Crafting checks, Performance checks, and Will saves. If the nymph grants her token to a bard, and she's the bard's muse, the queen chooses one additional benefit granted by her token: a +1 status bonus to all Lore checks, a +2 status bonus to Performance checks when determining the effects of compositions, a +4 status bonus to untrained skill checks, or a +2 status bonus to Will saves against fey. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Nymph Queen's Inspiration]

abilities.name: Tree Meld
abilities.effect_text: A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.One with Plants] spell cast by a dryad has an unlimited duration. In addition, if the dryad merges with any tree in her domain, she can choose to instead enter an extradimensional living space within the tree, and can bring up to eight adjacent, willing creatures with her; the spell gains the extradimensional trait. The dryad can still be expelled from this space.

abilities.name: Tree Dependent

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Head Hunter
abilities.effect_text: Any slashing weapon gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Keen] rune while a dullahan wields it, and any hatchet they wield gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Returning] rune as well. If the dullahan kills a creature with a critical hit using a slashing weapon, the target is decapitated as though the dullahan had used Reap on the target.

abilities.name: Reap
abilities.effect_text: The dullahan removes the head of a dead creature within reach. Each creature within the area of the dullahan's frightful presence must attempt a new save, even if it is temporarily immune.

abilities.name: Summon Steed
abilities.effect_text: The dullahan summons a war horse with elite adjustments and the fiend and unholy traits. This steed remains until it is slain, the dullahan Dismisses this effect, or the dullahan Summons a Steed again.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Death Effects
Ghost Dodge
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The duskwalker is targeted by a Strike or spell Effect The duskwalker gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC, resistance 5 to spirit damage, and increases their resistance to void damage to 5, all against the triggering attack.

abilities.name: Ghost Hunter
abilities.effect_text: The duskwalker's weapons have the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ghost Touch] property rune on attacks against incorporeal undead.

abilities.name: Spirit Hunter
abilities.effect_text: The duskwalker designates a single creature they can observe as their prey. The duskwalker gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks, Intimidation checks, and Stealth checks against their prey and to any check to Recall Knowledge about it, and deal an additional @Damage[2[spirit]] damage with all weapon Strikes against their prey. These effects last until the duskwalker uses Spirit Hunter again.

abilities.name: Spirit Shot
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Requirements The duskwalker has designated a creature as their prey using Spirit Hunter Effect The duskwalker makes two ranged Strikes against their prey. If both Strikes hit, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

The stonecaster can't use Boulder Roll again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Boulder Roll]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Dwarven Doughtiness
abilities.effect_text: A dwarf is often calm and collected in the face of imminent danger. At the end of this dwarf's turn, reduce their frightened condition by 2 instead of 1.

abilities.name: Tremor

Each creature on the ground in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] takes @Damage[2d8[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:prone] save. A creature that critically fails is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

abilities.name: Malevolent Possession
abilities.effect_text: The dybbuk attempts to possess an adjacent corporeal creature. This has the same effect as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Possession] spell (@Check[will|dc:34]) with an unlimited duration, except since the dybbuk doesn't have a physical body, they aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious], and aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] when the effect ends, though they take @Damage[5d6[spirit]] damage if the body is knocked unconscious or killed. If the dybbuk took control of the target with Malevolent Possession, when the dybbuk departs, the target has only incoherent memories of the interval it was possessed.

abilities.name: Eagle Dive
abilities.effect_text: The eagle @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Fly]{Flies} up to double its fly Speed in a straight line, descending at least 10 feet, and then makes a talon Strike.

abilities.name: Fast Healing 2 (While Underground)

abilities.name: Scree Breath
abilities.effect_text: The earth scamp breathes rocks in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] save). The earth scamp can't use Scree Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Scree Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Arcane Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: arcane | innate

abilities.name: Cinder Dispersal
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Trigger The elananx takes damage from a hostile source Effect The elananx disperses into a cloud of smoke and cinders, filling its space and a @Template[emanation|distance:20]. While in this form, the elananx can't be attacked or targeted, and it doesn't take up space. Anything inside this cloud is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and any creature ending its turn there takes @Damage[2d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage. At the start of its turn, the elananx returns to its normal form in any square the cloud covered. If the elananx Strikes a creature using its first action after returning to its normal form, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] and the Strike deals an extra 1d6 fire damage.

abilities.name: Pack Attack
abilities.effect_text: The elananx's Strikes deal an extra 1d6 damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of its allies.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.effect_text: The elananx Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the elananx began this action @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden], it remains hidden until after the attack.

abilities.name: Stunning Shock
abilities.effect_text: A creature critically hit by the electric eel's tail must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1}. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 2}. Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 3}.

abilities.name: Tremorsense (Imprecise) 90 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

abilities.name: Earthbound
abilities.effect_text: When not touching solid ground, the elemental avalanche is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1}, can't use reactions, and can't Trample.

abilities.name: Crumble
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The elemental avalanche takes damage from a hostile source while atop rock or earth Effect The elemental avalanche crumbles into the ground, Burrowing down 20 feet. This Burrowing does not trigger reactions. The elemental avalanche can't Crumble again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Crumble]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Spike Stones
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. Spikes of rock rise up from all stone surfaces in the emanation, creating difficult terrain. A creature moving in the terrain takes @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage for each square of spikes it moves into (a Large or larger creature takes damage only once for each square it moves, even if its space covers multiple squares of spikes). Creatures with the earth trait ignore all effects within the area. The elemental avalanche can disable or activate this aura using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

abilities.name: Earth Glide
abilities.effect_text: The elemental avalanche can Burrow through any earthen matter, including rock. When it does so, the elemental avalanche moves at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of its passing.

abilities.name: Grinding Stones
abilities.effect_text: The elemental avalanche deals @Damage[4d12[bludgeoning]] damage to each @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] creature within the elemental's melee reach with a @Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] save.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Large or smaller, fist, @Check[reflex|dc:30|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.name: Knockdown
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Knockdown]

abilities.name: Disperse
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The elemental hurricane takes damage from a hostile action. Effect The elemental hurricane disperses. Until the end of the current turn, it can't be attacked or targeted, doesn't take up space, and any auras or emanations it has are suppressed. At the end of the turn, the elemental hurricane reforms in any space in which it can fit within 100 feet of where it dispersed and any auras or emanations it has are restored as long as their duration didn't run out while it was dispersed.

abilities.name: High Winds
abilities.effect_text: 40 feet. Air within the emanation is difficult terrain for Flying creatures that don't have the air trait.

abilities.name: Swiftness
abilities.effect_text: The elemental's movement doesn't trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Gale Breath
abilities.effect_text: The elemental exhales a @Template[cone|distance:30] of air. Creatures in the cone must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save or be knocked away from the elemental. A creature knocked into a solid object stops moving and takes @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (roll the damage once for all creatures). The elemental hurricane can't use Gale Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Gale Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is pushed 20 feet. Failure The creature is pushed 40 feet. Critical Failure The creature is pushed 40 feet and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

abilities.name: Push 10 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Push]

abilities.name: Smoke Vision
abilities.effect_text: The elemental inferno ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition from smoke.

abilities.name: Explosion
abilities.effect_text: When the elemental inferno dies, it explodes, dealing @Damage[7d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:10|traits:fire,damaging-effect] (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] save).

abilities.name: Intense Heat
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. @Damage[7d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect]

abilities.name: Blue Flames
abilities.effect_text: When the elemental inferno scores a critical hit, its body surges with blue flames, increasing the damage of its intense heat and Inferno Leap by 3d6 until the start of its next turn.

abilities.name: Inferno Leap
abilities.effect_text: The elemental inferno jumps horizontally and vertically with a maximum height and distance each equal to its Speed. Its intense heat is suppressed until the end of the jump. Instead, at any point during the jump, flames explode from the elemental in a @Template[emanation|distance:30], dealing @Damage[12d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] save). The elemental inferno can't Inferno Leap again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Inferno Leap]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Waterbound
abilities.effect_text: When not touching water, the elemental tsunami is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

abilities.name: Vortex
abilities.effect_text: 50 feet. Water in the area that is in the same body of water as the elemental tsunami is difficult terrain for Swimming creatures that don't have the water trait.

abilities.name: Drench
abilities.effect_text: The elemental puts out all fires in a @Template[emanation|distance:20]. It extinguishes all non-magical fires automatically and attempts to counteract magical fires ([[/r 1d20+20 #Drench]]{+20} counteract modifier).

abilities.name: Surge
abilities.effect_text: The elemental tsunami momentarily expands to fill the area of its vortex. Creatures within the aura take @Damage[(5d12+6)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:31|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save. A creature that fails this save is pushed 20 feet. The elemental tsunami then shrinks to its normal space and can't Surge again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Surge]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Push or Pull 10 feet
abilities.effect_text: The elemental tsunami can choose whether to push or pull the creature on a successful hit. Push 1 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Push] Pull 1 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Pull]

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Large or smaller, foot, @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.name: Grabbing Trunk
abilities.effect_text: A Medium or smaller creature hit by the elephant's trunk is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed]. If the elephant moves, it can bring the Grabbed creature along with it.

abilities.name: Double Shot
abilities.effect_text: The elf ranger makes two shortbow Strikes targeting two different creatures within the shortbow's first range increment. Both Strikes uses the elf's current multiple attack penalty, but each strike takes a –2 penalty.

abilities.name: Elf Step
abilities.effect_text: The elf Steps twice.

abilities.name: Unimpeded Journey
abilities.effect_text: The elf ranger ignores difficult terrain.

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

abilities.effect_text: Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack Effect Divine power intercedes, preventing some of the damage. The dragon gains resistance 10 to all damage against the triggering attack.

abilities.name: Inspiring Presence
abilities.effect_text: 40 feet. The mere sight of an empyreal dragon motivates other creatures. Creatures within the aura gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws and skill checks. The empyreal dragon can't gain the benefit of their own aura or other actions that use the aura, and they can choose to exclude any creatures from any benefit of the aura or action that uses the aura.

abilities.name: Direct Halo
abilities.effect_text: The dragon tosses their halo to a square within 90 feet. While the halo is deployed in this way, the dragon loses their inspiring presence aura, and the aura instead emanates from the halo with the same emanation radius. The dragon can Sustain to recall the halo from any distance. The halo is made of pure light—it doesn't occupy space and can't be targeted or destroyed in any way.

abilities.name: Halo Pulse
abilities.effect_text: The dragon chooses one effect to impose on creatures in their inspiring presence aura. The dragon can't use Halo Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Halo Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}. Restriction (incapacitation, mental) Creatures must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:41] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure) while they remain within the aura. Regardless of the result, a creature is then temporarily immune to restriction for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Spirit Breath
abilities.effect_text: The dragon unleashes a blast of holy fire that deals @Damage[16d8[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:50] (@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic|options:area-effect] save). The dragon can't use Spirit Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Spirit Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Turbulent Seas
abilities.effect_text: 40 feet. Water in the aura that is also in the same body of water as the faydhaan is difficult terrain for Swimming creatures. Creatures with the water trait are immune.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The faydhaan transforms into a Small or Medium water elemental, aquatic animal, or humanoid. This doesn't affect their statistics, but it could change the damage type of their Strikes. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Gift of Hospitality
abilities.effect_text: The faydhaan gives another willing creature a magical gift or an agreeable conversation. The creature gains a +2 status bonus to Society and Diplomacy checks. A creature can't have more than one gift at a time, and a faydhaan can't grant more than one gift at a time. The gift ends if the target acts hostile, or if the faydhaan renounces the recipient (a single action). @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Gift of Hospitality]

abilities.name: Skewer
abilities.effect_text: The faydhaan makes a trident Strike, dealing an extra @Damage[2d6[bleed]]{2d6 persistent bleed damage} on a hit (@Damage[4d6[bleed]]{4d6} on a critical hit).

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Telepathy]

abilities.effect_text: The dragonet breathes euphoric gas in a @Template[cone|distance:15]. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}; on a critical failure, the duration is 1 minute. The fey dragonet can't use Euphoric Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Euphoric Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Flaming Stroke
abilities.effect_text: The fire giant imbues their blade with flames and makes a greatsword Strike with a –2 circumstance penalty against each creature in a @Template[line|distance:15]. They make one attack roll only and compare the result to each creature's AC. This Strike deals an additional 1d6 fire damage and counts as one attack for the fire giant's multiple attack penalty

abilities.name: Smoke Vision
abilities.effect_text: The fire scamp ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition from smoke.

abilities.name: Fast Healing 2 (While Touching Fire)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FastHealing]

abilities.name: Flame Breath
abilities.effect_text: The fire scamp breathes flames in a @Template[cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[2d4[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] save). Creatures that fail the save also take @Damage[1d4[persistent,fire]] damage. The fire scamp can't use Flame Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Flame Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Arcane Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: arcane | innate

abilities.name: Smoke Vision
abilities.effect_text: The firewyrm ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition from smoke.

abilities.name: Explosion
abilities.effect_text: When the firewyrm dies, it explodes, dealing @Damage[6d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save).

abilities.name: Intense Heat
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect]

abilities.name: Breath Fire
abilities.effect_text: The firewyrm breathes a @Template[cone|distance:30] of fire dealing @Damage[7d6[fire],2d8[persistent,fire]|options:area-damage] damage to every creature within the cone (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). The firewyrm can't Breathe Fire again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breathe Fire]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Smoke Vision
abilities.effect_text: Smoke doesn't impair a flame drake's vision; they ignore @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} from smoke.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike (Fangs Only)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The flame drake makes two Fangs Strikes and one Tail Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Fireball Breath
abilities.effect_text: The flame drake expels a ball of flame to a range of 180 feet that explodes in a @Template[burst|distance:20]. Creatures in the burst take @Damage[6d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] save). The flame drake can't use Fireball Breath again for [[/gmr 1d6 #Recharge Fireball Breath]]{1d6 rounds}.

abilities.name: Speed Surge
abilities.effect_text: Frequency three times per day Effect The flame drake Strides or Flies twice.

abilities.name: Luminescent Aura
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. The flash beetle's bioluminescent organs fill the area with bright light.

abilities.name: Light Flash
abilities.effect_text: The flash beetle creates a brilliant flash of light. All creatures in its luminescent aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute. The flash beetle's glow then goes out, disabling its aura for 24 hours, during which time it cannot use Light Flash.

abilities.name: Easily Misled
abilities.effect_text: The forest troll gets a –4 circumstance penalty to their Perception DC against Deception checks.

abilities.name: Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Electricity or Fire)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

abilities.name: Furious Flailing
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The forest troll takes electricity or fire damage Effect The troll makes a claw Strike against a random creature within its reach. If the troll has persistent fire damage, they attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15] to remove it.

abilities.name: Chase Prey
abilities.effect_text: The forest troll rushes forward on all fours, Striding and then making two claw Strikes.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.effect_text: Claw @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

abilities.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane
Aura of Disruption
abilities.effect_text: 120 feet. The dragon radiates disruptive energies that allow them to feed on magic. When a spell is counteracted or disrupted within the aura, the dragon regains one expended spontaneous spell slot and gains 25 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Capture Spell
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The dragon succeeds or critically succeeds on a saving throw against a spell Effect The dragon attempts to capture a portion of the spell's magic to feed themself. They attempt to counteract the spell (counteract rank 7, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+28 #Counteract]]{+28}). If successful, the dragon is unaffected by the spell and regains one expended spontaneous spell slot; other subjects are affected by the spell normally.

abilities.name: Disruptive Breath
abilities.effect_text: The dragon unleashes a spray of magic-disrupting energies that deals @Damage[13d6[force]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:40] (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect] save). Creatures that fail become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) for 1 minute. The dragon can't use Disruptive Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Disruptive Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Share the Wealth
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon's body is covered in riches (this is typically the case when the dragon is first encountered) Effect The dragon shakes their body aggressively, sending coins and other riches flying in every direction, dealing @Damage[9d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:35|basic|options:area-effect] save to all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:40]. The dragon's body is then no longer covered in riches.

abilities.name: Treasure Dive
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon's body isn't covered in riches and the dragon is adjacent to their hoard Effect The dragon Strides or Burrows through their hoard using their land Speed. They coat themself in coins, magic items, and other treasures. This contact with magical items revitalizes the dragon, causing them to regain one expended spontaneous spell slot. The dragon can move through other creatures while moving in this way. Creatures in the dragon's path, or above it if the dragon Burrows, must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:33] save or be pushed 10 feet (or pushed 20 feet and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] on a critical failure).

If successful, the dragon is unaffected by the spell and regains one expended spontaneous spell slot; other subjects are affected by the spell normally.

abilities.name: Disruptive Breath
abilities.effect_text: The dragon unleashes a spray of magic-disrupting energies that deals @Damage[9d6[force]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect] save). Creatures that fail become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure) for 1 minute. The dragon can't use Disruptive Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Disruptive Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Share the Wealth
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon's body is covered in riches (this is typically the case when the dragon is first encountered) Effect The dragon shakes their body aggressively, sending coins and other riches flying in every direction, dealing @Damage[6d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|options:area-effect] save to all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. The dragon's body is then no longer covered in riches.

abilities.name: Treasure Dive
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon's body isn't covered in riches and the dragon is adjacent to their hoard Effect The dragon Strides or Burrows through their hoard using their land Speed. They coat themself in coins, magic items, and other treasures. This contact with magical items revitalizes the dragon, causing them to regain one expended spontaneous spell slot. The dragon can move through other creatures while moving in this way. Creatures in the dragon's path, or above it if the dragon Burrows, must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:27] save or be pushed 10 feet (or pushed 20 feet and knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] on a critical failure).
