abilities.name: Snow Vision
abilities.effect_text: Snow doesn't impair a frost drake's vision; they ignore @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} from snowfall.

abilities.name: Retaliatory Strike
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within reach of the frost drake's tail successfully damages the frost drake with a Strike Effect The frost drake attempts to Strike with their tail. If the Strike hits, it deals an additional 1d6 damage.

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The frost drake makes two Fangs Strikes and one Tail Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Freezing Mist Breath
abilities.effect_text: The frost drake spits a ball of liquid up to 60 feet that explodes into a @Template[burst|distance:20] cloud of freezing mist. Those in the burst take @Damage[8d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect] save). The frost drake can't use Freezing Mist Breath again for [[/gmr 1d6 #Recharge Freezing Mist Breath]]{1d6 rounds}, during which the mist cakes all surfaces in the area with a sheet of slippery ice that turns the area into difficult terrain.

abilities.name: Ice Climb
abilities.effect_text: A frost drake isn't impeded by difficult terrain caused by snow or ice, nor do they need to attempt Acrobatics checks to keep from falling on slippery ice.

abilities.name: Speed Surge
abilities.effect_text: Frequency three times per day; Effect The frost drake Strides or Flies twice.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Chill Breath
abilities.effect_text: The frost giant breathes out a @Template[cone|distance:15] of freezing moisture that quickly condenses into ice, dealing @Damage[4d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage. Each creature in the cone must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save. A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] and takes @Damage[2d6[cold]] damage at the end of each of its turns until it gets free ([[/act escape dc=28]]). The giant can't use Chill Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Chill Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Ice Stride
abilities.effect_text: A frost giant isn't impeded by difficult terrain caused by snow or ice, nor do they need to attempt Acrobatics checks to keep from falling on slippery ice.

abilities.name: Wide Swing
abilities.effect_text: The frost giant makes a single greataxe Strike and compares the attack roll result to the ACs of up to two foes within their reach. This counts as two attacks for the frost giant's multiple attack penalty.

abilities.name: Verdant Burst
abilities.effect_text: When a fungus leshy dies, a burst of primal energy explodes from its body, restoring @Damage[2d8[healing]] Hit Points to each fungi creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This area is filled with fungi, becoming difficult terrain. If the terrain is not a viable environment for this fungi, they wither after 24 hours.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The fungus leshy transforms into a giant mushroom or patch of fungi. This ability otherwise uses the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.One with Plants]. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Spore Cloud
abilities.effect_text: A fungus leshy can unleash a cloud of spores that irritates the eyes and throats of non-fungus creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:15]. Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:16|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save or take @Damage[1[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage. A creature has its vision reduced as long as the persistent damage continues and can see only within 20 feet.

abilities.name: Spores
abilities.effect_text: A creature that takes damage from a fungus leshy's spore pod Strike must attempt a saving throw with the same DC (@Check[fortitude|dc:16]) and effect as its Spore Cloud ability

abilities.name: Vulnerable to Smoke

abilities.name: Change Shape

abilities.name: Statue

abilities.name: Site Bound
abilities.effect_text: A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.effect_text: Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife. When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

abilities.name: Construct Armor (Hardness 10)
abilities.effect_text: Like normal objects, a giant animated statue has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage it takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once a giant animated statue is reduced to less than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks and its Armor Class is reduced to 22.

abilities.name: Brazier
abilities.effect_text: The statue carries a wide brazier full of hot coals. To make flaming coal Strikes or use Burn Alive, the statue must have the brazier held in one hand or otherwise have it within reach. Instead of targeting the statue with an attack, a creature can target the brazier directly. The brazier has the same AC and saves as the statue. Dealing 15 cold damage to the brazier or dousing it with at least 2 gallons of water extinguishes the coals. This prevents the statue from using Burn Alive and causes its ranged attacks to no longer deal fire damage.

abilities.name: Burn Alive
abilities.effect_text: The statue grinds a creature it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] into the red-hot coals of its brazier. The target takes @Damage[3d8[fire],1d8[persistent,fire]] damage.

abilities.name: Focused Assault
abilities.effect_text: The flytrap attacks a single target with all four of its leaves. The flytrap makes one leaf Strike. On a success, the flytrap deals the damage from one leaf Strike plus an additional 1d8 damage for every leaf beyond the first. On a failure, the flytrap deals the damage from one leaf Strike, but it can't use Improved Grab. It deals no damage on a critical failure. This counts toward the flytrap's multiple attack penalty as a number of attacks equal to the number of leaves the flytrap has.

abilities.name: Hungry Flurry

abilities.name: Broadcast Stance

The gosreg's unsettled aura extends to 60 feet, and it blocks all other creatures' telepathy in the aura. Its Mind Bolt can also affect any number of targets in 60 feet. These effects end when the gosreg uses its claw Strike, leaves its space, or is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The gosreg takes on the appearance of any Small or Medium humanoid. This doesn't change its Speed or attack and damage modifiers with its claw, but it might change the damage type it deals (typically to bludgeoning). It cannot use its jaws Strike while in humanoid form. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Mind Bolt

abilities.name: Change Shape

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.effect_text: When a graveknight is destroyed, their armor rebuilds their body over the course of [[/gmr 1d10]] days—or more quickly if the armor is worn by a living host. If the body is destroyed before then, the process restarts. A graveknight can only be permanently destroyed by obliterating their armor (such as with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Disintegrate]), transporting it to the Forge of Creation, or throwing it into the heart of a volcano.

abilities.name: Sacrilegious Aura
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. When a creature in the aura uses a vitality spell or ability, the graveknight automatically attempts to counteract it, with a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}.

The graveknight can use this ability once every [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Devastating Blast]] rounds.

abilities.name: Graveknight's Curse
abilities.effect_text: This curse affects anyone who wears a graveknight's armor for at least 1 hour Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:33] save Onset 1 hour Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 1} and can't remove armor (1 day) Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 2}, –10-foot status penalty to Speeds, and can't remove armor (1 day) Stage 3 dies and transforms into the armor's graveknight.

abilities.name: Phantom Mount
abilities.effect_text: HP 58; AC 27, Fort +17, Ref +15, Will +14 The graveknight summons a supernatural mount, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Marvelous Mount] heightened to a rank equal to half the graveknight's level. Unlike marvelous mount , the steed's AC and saving throw bonuses are all 4 lower than the graveknight's, and the steed has one-third the graveknight's Hit Points (rounded down). If the steed is destroyed, the graveknight must wait 1 hour before using this ability again.

abilities.name: Weapon Master

After the Strike, the shark splashes back down into the water.

abilities.name: Savage

abilities.name: Strafing Chomp

The hell hound can't use Hellfire Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hellfire Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. If the greater hell hound would take fire damage or be targeted by a fire effect, their Hellfire Breath recharges.

abilities.name: Pack Attack

It's then temporarily immune to being sickened by the smoke for 1 minute. This is an inhaled poison, and the nightmare and its rider are immune to it.

abilities.name: Flaming Gallop

This @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Shadow Spawn] doesn't have Steal Shadow. If the creature the shadow spawn was pulled from dies, the shadow spawn becomes a full-fledged, autonomous shadow. If the creature recovers from its enfeeblement, its shadow returns to it and the shadow spawn is extinguished.

abilities.name: Slink in Shadows
abilities.effect_text: The shadow can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide] or end its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak] in a creature's or object's shadow.

abilities.name: Steal Shadow
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The shadow hit a living creature with a shadow hand Strike on its previous action Effect The shadow pulls at the target's shadow, making the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} on a critical hit). This is cumulative with other enfeebled conditions from shadows, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 4}. If this increases a creature's enfeebled value to 3 or more, the target's shadow is separated from its body (see shadow spawn). The enfeebled value from Steal Shadow decreases by 1 every hour.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Animals are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for as long as they're frightened. Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3}. Animals are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] as long as they're frightened.

abilities.name: Implant Core
abilities.effect_text: The grikkitog implants its core into an adjacent section of earth or stone, melding seamlessly and changing its visual appearance to match the surrounding rock. It's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] but automatically succeeds at its Deception check to Impersonate the stone around it; creatures actively searching for it can still attempt Perception checks against its Deception DC as normal. A grikkitog can release its implantation as a free action, which has the manipulate trait. A grikkitog's infestation aura and manifold vision are only active while implanted.

abilities.name: Manifold Vision
abilities.effect_text: While its core is implanted, the grikkitog can see through the eyes it creates throughout the area of its infestation aura, gaining the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.All-Around Vision].

abilities.name: Infestation Aura
abilities.effect_text: 120 feet. While its core is implanted, a grikkitog infests all earth and stone within 120 feet, as long as there is a contiguous physical connection between the earth, including stone objects touching the ground. This effect spreads even if the grikkitog does not have line of effect, though it can affect earth or stone on the surface and exposed to the air only if at least part of its core is exposed as well. Within the aura, it can grow maws and eyes everywhere. It can make jaws attacks against any creature, originating from any earth or stone in the aura adjacent to that creature. Determine cover from the origin point of the attack, not from the grikkitog's core.

abilities.name: Barbed Maw
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The grikkitog hits a creature with a jaws Strike Effect The grikkitog sinks its barbed teeth into the target, which must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:34|options:inflicts:immobilized] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized]. While immobilized, the victim takes @Damage[3d8[persistent,bleed]] damage and the grikkitog feeds upon its flesh. The creature is immobilized until the grikkitog ends the effect as a free action or the target succeeds at a DC 38 check to [[/act escape dc=38]]. The grikkitog can immobilize any number of creatures with these maws.

abilities.name: Earth Glide
abilities.effect_text: The grikkitog can Burrow through dirt and stone at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of its passing.

abilities.name: Death's Grace
abilities.effect_text: The Grim Reaper can choose whether or not it counts as undead for effects that affect undead differently. Even if it does not count as undead, the Grim Reaper still never counts as a living creature.

If the Strike hits, the Grim Reaper disrupts the triggering action.

abilities.effect_text: A creature killed by the Grim Reaper can't be brought back to life by any means short of divine intervention.

If the Grim Reaper Strikes a creature with a weakness to any specific type of damage, the scythe's damage counts as that type of damage, in addition to slashing.

abilities.name: Encage in Tentacles
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The gylou has a Medium or smaller creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] Effect The gylou transfers the grabbed creature into their lower body's net of encaging tentacles, freeing their limbs and tentacles to make Strikes. This has the same effects as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Swallow Whole] (Medium, @Damage[(2d12+12)[bludgeoning]], Rupture 30), except the encaged creature is not at risk of suffocation, and the gylou can bring the encaged creature with them when they cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Translocate]. A gylou can have only one creature encaged at a time.

abilities.name: Indispensable Savvy
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Trigger The gylou attempts a skill check but hasn't rolled yet Effect The gylou demonstrates a preternatural ability for the task at hand. They use their Deception modifier for the triggering check and for all skill checks using the same skill thereafter until the next time the gylou uses this ability or until 24 hours have passed, whichever happens first.

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: divine | innate

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per minute Effect The hadrosaurid Strides twice. It has a +20-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these Strides.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Large or smaller, foot, @Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.name: Keen Eyes
abilities.effect_text: The halfling gains a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek] action to find @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Undetected] creatures within 30 feet of it. Whenever the halfling targets a creature that is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] or hidden from them, reduce the DC of the flat check to @Check[flat|dc:3] for a concealed target or @Check[flat|dc:9] for a hidden one.

abilities.name: Graffiti Egg
abilities.effect_text: The halfling troublemaker throws an egg filled with paint, glitter, and confetti at a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed a @Check[reflex|dc:17] saving throw or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round (or 1 minute on a critical failure).

abilities.name: Keen Eyes
abilities.effect_text: The halfling gains a +2 circumstance bonus when using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Seek] action to find @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Undetected] creatures within 30 feet of it. Whenever the halfling targets a creature that is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] or hidden from them, reduce the DC of the flat check to @Check[flat|dc:3] for a concealed target or @Check[flat|dc:9] for a hidden one.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.effect_text: The troublemaker deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] creatures.

abilities.name: Wind's Whispers
abilities.effect_text: When a harpy speaks, they can choose one creature within 90 feet. That creature can hear the harpy's words over any other sound, but no other creature hears the words at all.

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. @Check[fortitude|dc:21|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Stench]

abilities.name: Hungry Winds
abilities.effect_text: The harpy uses the wind to pull its prey closer. A target within 20 feet must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save or be pulled adjacent to the harpy, where they make a jaws Strike against the target. If the target was pulled off the ground and can't fly, it then falls as normal.

abilities.name: Putrid Plague
abilities.effect_text: The sickened and unconscious conditions from putrid plague can't end or be reduced until the disease is cured Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19] Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1d4 hours), Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (1 day), Stage 3 sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} (1 day), Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] (1 day), Stage 5 dead

abilities.name: Hellfire Breath
abilities.effect_text: The hell hound breathes flames that deal @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:15] (@Check[reflex|dc:19|basic|options:area-effect] save). The hell hound can't use Hellfire Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hellfire Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. If the hell hound would take fire damage or be targeted by a fire effect, their Hellfire Breath recharges.

abilities.name: Pack Attack
abilities.effect_text: The hell hound's Strikes deal 1d4 extra damage to creatures within the reach of at least two of the hell hounds' allies.

abilities.name: Final Blasphemy
abilities.effect_text: When the herexen is destroyed, it explodes in a wave of void energy with the effects of a 3-action @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Harm] spell (@Check[fortitude|dc:18]). The herexen is destroyed, so it doesn't gain any Hit Points from this use of harm , and it doesn't need to have any harm spells remaining to use this ability

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Heretic's Smite
abilities.effect_text: While wielding the favored weapon of its former deity (such as a dagger for an ex-Pharasmin herexen), the herexen's Strikes deal an additional 1d6 spirit damage to creatures with the holy trait.

abilities.name: Sudden Retreat
abilities.effect_text: The hippocampus makes a tail Strike, then Swims with a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its swim Speed. It gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement.

abilities.name: Buck
abilities.effect_text: @Check[reflex|dc:17] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Buck]

abilities.name: Flying Strafe
abilities.effect_text: The hippogriff Flies up to its fly speed and makes two talon Strikes at any point during that movement. Each Strike must target a different creature. The attacks take the normal multiple attack penalty.

abilities.name: Formation
abilities.effect_text: When it's adjacent to at least two other allies, the hobgoblin archer gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and saving throws. This bonus increases to +2 to Reflex saves against area effects.

abilities.name: Crossbow Precision
abilities.effect_text: The first time the archer hits with a crossbow attack in a round, it deals 1d8 extra precision damage.

abilities.name: Perfect Aim
abilities.effect_text: The hobgoblin archer ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition. Their targets don't benefit from lesser cover, and they reduce the AC bonus from standard cover by 2 against the hobgoblin archer's attack.

abilities.name: Running Reload
abilities.effect_text: The archer Strides, Steps, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak]{Sneaks}, then Interacts to reload.

abilities.name: General's Cry
abilities.effect_text: When a hobgoblin general rolls initiative, as long as they can perceive at least one foe, they can yell a mighty battle cry. The hobgoblin general attempts an Intimidate check to [[/act demoralize]] a single foe within 60 feet as a free action. If successful, any ally can, as its first action on its first turn of the combat, Stride up to double its speed as a single action.

abilities.name: Formation
abilities.effect_text: When it's adjacent to at least two other allies, the hobgoblin general gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and saving throws. This bonus increases to +2 to Reflex saves against area effects.

abilities.name: Polearm Critical Specialization
abilities.effect_text: On a critical hit, the target of the critical hit is moved 5 feet in a direction of the hobgoblin general's choice.

abilities.name: Formation
abilities.effect_text: When it's adjacent to at least two other allies, the hobgoblin soldier gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and saving throws. This bonus increases to +2 to Reflex saves against area effects.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Shield Block
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ShieldBlock]

abilities.name: Master Link
abilities.effect_text: A homunculus can't speak, but it is telepathically linked to its creator. It can share information back and forth, including its master's knowledge and everything the homunculus hears. The range of this link is 1,500 feet. The homunculus typically has a similar attitude to its creator and is utterly faithful. If the homunculus is destroyed, the master takes @Damage[2d10[mental]] damage. If the master is slain, the homunculus becomes mindless, claims its current location as its lair, and instinctively attacks anyone who comes near.

abilities.name: Homunculus Poison
abilities.effect_text: A homunculus has one dose of poison in a reservoir in its head. It can refill this poison from its reserves with an Interact action Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15] Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round).

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Primal
Frightful Presence
abilities.effect_text: 90 feet. @Check[will|dc:31|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

abilities.name: Twisting Tail
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within reach of the dragon's tail uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using Effect The dragon makes a tail Strike at the creature with a –2 penalty. If the Strike hits, the dragon disrupts the creature's action.

abilities.name: Forest Passage
abilities.effect_text: The horned dragon ignores any difficult terrain caused by plants, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants manipulated by magic don't impede their progress.

abilities.name: Impaling Charge
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The dragon doesn't have a creature impaled on their horn Effect The dragon attempts to gore a foe. They Stride, then attempt a horn Strike. On a hit, the target becomes impaled on the dragon's horn. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] while on the horn (and can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape] as normal). The dragon doesn't need to use additional actions to keep the impaled creature grabbed. If the dragon moves, they bring the grabbed creature along with them.

abilities.name: Web Sense
abilities.effect_text: The hunting spider has imprecise tremorsense to detect the vibrations of creatures touching its web. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

abilities.name: Spring Upon Prey
abilities.effect_text: Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled. Trigger A creature touches the hunting spider's web while the spider is on it. Effect The hunting spider automatically notices the creature and Strides, Climbs, or Descends on a Web before it rolls initiative.

abilities.name: Descend on a Web
abilities.effect_text: The hunting spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage. A creature that successfully Strikes the web (AC 20, Hardness 3, 5 HP) severs it, causing the spider to fall.

abilities.name: Hunting Spider Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16] Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1}, and off-guard (1 round) Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}, and off-guard (1 round)

abilities.name: Web Trap
abilities.effect_text: A creature hit by the hunting spider's web Strike is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] and stuck to the nearest surface until it [[/act escape dc=17]]{Escapes}.

abilities.name: Bonecrunching Bite
abilities.effect_text: A creature that is critically hit by a hyaenodon must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Wounded]{Wounded 1} as the creature's bones or cartilage are crushed by the beast's jaws.

abilities.name: Drag
abilities.effect_text: The hyaenodon makes a jaws Strike against a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] enemy. If it hits, in addition to dealing damage, the hyaenodon Strides up to 10 feet, dragging the enemy along.

abilities.name: Pack Attack
abilities.effect_text: The hyaenodon deals an extra 1d6 damage to any creature within reach of at least two of the hyaenodon's allies.

abilities.name: Knockdown
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Knockdown]

abilities.name: All-Around Vision
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AllAroundVision]

abilities.name: Hydra Regeneration
abilities.effect_text: The hydra has regeneration equal to 3 x the number of heads it has. If a hydra's body is missing any heads and the remaining stumps have not been cauterized, the hydra attempts a @Check[fortitude|immutable:true|dc:25] save after it regains Hit Points from regeneration. On a success, one uncauterized stump regrows two heads; on a critical success, two uncauterized stumps regrow into two heads each. The hydra can never grow more than double the number of heads it ordinarily has. The hydra's regeneration only fully deactivates if all its heads are severed and all stumps are cauterized, at which point it dies. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

abilities.name: Head Regrowth
abilities.effect_text: A hydra ordinarily has five heads. A creature can attempt to sever one of the hydra's heads by specifically targeting it and dealing damage equal to the head's Hit Points. A head that is not completely severed returns to full Hit Points at the end of any creature's turn. A hydra can regrow a severed head using hydra regeneration. A creature can prevent this regrowth by dealing acid or fire damage to the stump, cauterizing it. Single-target acid or fire effects need to be targeted at a specific stump, but effects that deal splash damage or affect areas covering the hydra's whole space cauterize all stumps if they deal acid or fire damage. If the attack that severs a head deals any acid or fire damage, the stump is cauterized instantly. If all five heads are cauterized, the hydra dies. Hydra Head Hit Points 15 Immunities Area Damage Weaknesses Slashing 5 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Hydra Heads]

abilities.name: Reactive Heads
abilities.effect_text: A hydra gains an extra reaction per round for each of its heads beyond the first, which it can use only to make Reactive Strikes. It can't use more than 1 reaction on the same triggering action, even if a creature leaves several squares within its reach, and the hydra must use a different head for each Reactive Strike it makes. Whenever one of the hydra's heads is severed, the hydra loses 1 of its extra reactions per round.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike (See Reactive Heads)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Focused Assault
abilities.effect_text: The hydra attacks a single target with its heads, overwhelming its foe with multiple attacks and leaving almost nowhere to dodge. The hydra Strikes with its fangs. On a successful attack, the hydra deals damage from its fangs Strike to the target, plus an additional 1d6 damage for every head it has beyond the first. On a failure (but not a critical failure), the hydra deals the damage from one fangs Strike to the target creature. This Strike counts as a number of attacks equal to the number of heads the hydra has toward the hydra's multiple attack penalty.

abilities.name: Storm of Jaws
abilities.effect_text: The hydra makes a number of Strikes up to its number of heads, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the hydra's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the hydra makes all its attacks.

abilities.name: Drag
abilities.effect_text: The hyena makes a jaws Strike against a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] enemy. If it hits, in addition to dealing damage, the hyena Strides up to 10 feet, dragging the enemy along.

abilities.name: Pack Attack
abilities.effect_text: The hyena deals an extra 1d4 damage to any creature that's within reach of at least two of the hyena's allies.

abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:38] Maximum Duration 10 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 round); Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} (1 round)

abilities.name: Icemire Breath
abilities.effect_text: The ice linnorm spews out a blast of freezing, viscous ooze in a @Template[cone|distance:60] that deals @Damage[15d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect] save). The freezing ooze clings to those struck and hardens into thick sheets of ice. A creature that fails the saving throw is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] by the ice until it succeeds at a check to [[/act escape dc=34]] or it or an ally [[/act force-open dc=34]]{Forces Open} the ice (DC 34 for either case). At the start of its turn, a creature still immobilized by the ice takes @Damage[4d6[cold]] damage. Another creature can free a frozen target by dealing a total of 20 fire damage to the frozen target. Left unattended, the ice crumbles away in 1 minute on its own. Creatures with the fire trait can't be frozen in place by Icemire Breath. Flying creatures fall if frozen, and swimming creatures that are frozen rise toward the surface of the water at a speed of 60 feet per round. The linnorm can't use Icemire Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Icemire Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Change Shape

While transformed, the imp loses their normal senses, innate spells, and special actions, but doesn't otherwise change their statistics and can still speak and use telepathy. The imp also gains any special senses of the animal and any Speeds the animal has. This doesn't change the attack and damage modifiers of their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (depending on what kinds of attacks the animal has) and prevents them from exposing creatures to imp venom. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round. Effect The imp regains @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points.

abilities.name: Fiendish Temptation
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The imp offers a nonfiend within 15 feet a bargain, granting a boon of good luck if the creature accepts voluntarily. The boon lasts for 1 hour once accepted. Once during the hour, the creature can roll an attack roll or saving throw twice and use the higher result. If the creature dies while the boon is in place, the imp decides where the creature's soul travels. This typically makes the soul bound for eternity in the imp's home plane, and the creature unable to be raised or resurrected except by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wish] ritual or similar magic.

abilities.name: Mind Lash
abilities.effect_text: A creature hit by an irnakurse's tentacle is overwhelmed with corrupted images of a ruined life and must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 4} on a critical failure). After attempting this save, the creature is temporarily immune to mind lash for 24 hours.

abilities.name: Soul Scream
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The irnakurse unleashes an alien shriek of nightmarish horror and pain. All non-aberration creatures within a @Template[emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:28] save. The irnakurse can Sustain Soul Scream for up to 6 rounds; each time it does, it repeats the effect without a new save. Critical Success The creature is unaffected, and it's temporarily immune to Soul Scream for 24 hours. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. Failure The creature is stupefied 1. Further failed saves against Soul Scream increase the stupefied value by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}. Each time the character gets a full night's rest, the stupefied condition gained from Soul Scream decreases by 1. Critical Failure As failure, except the stupefied value increases by 2 instead of by 1.

abilities.name: Storm of Tentacles
abilities.effect_text: The irnakurse makes up to four tentacle Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the irnakurse's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all of its attacks.

abilities.name: Coven
abilities.effect_text: An iron hag adds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Earthbind], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Impaling Spike], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Spellwrack] to their coven's spells. Their spell DC when leading a coven is 24. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Bonds of Iron
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The hag causes a cage built of cold iron fingernails to spring out of nothingness around one creature within 30 feet, attempting an Athletics check to [[/act grapple]] against the target's Fortitude DC; if the target has a weakness to cold iron, the iron hag gains a +2 circumstance bonus to this check. On a success, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] by the magical fingernails (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] on a critical success). If the creature successfully [[/act escape dc=24]]{Escapes}, the cage crumbles into rust. Any creature can attempt to destroy the cage by attacking it. It has an AC of 19, Hardness 10, and 40 Hit Points.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The iron hag can take on the appearance of any Medium female humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Embrace of Iron
abilities.effect_text: Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] by the iron hag's claw Effect The hag's nails tear into their captured victim, dealing @Damage[2d8[piercing]|traits:cold-iron] damage (the nails are cold iron). Then the hag can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Reposition] the creature. If the creature is adjacent to the hag, they can then attempt a jaws Strike against it.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Water
Bean Panic
abilities.effect_text: Oni are curiously afraid of beans, especially as the seasons begin to change. If a creature Interacts to throw a handful of beans at the oni, the oni becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. While frightened this way, their weakness to spirit damage is increased by 5. The oni then becomes immune to bean panic for 24 hours.

abilities.name: Lost Oni Island
abilities.effect_text: An island oni can claim an island of up to 1-mile radius in a process that takes 1 week, during which the oni must defeat any who come to challenge its claim. If successful, the oni can freely control the weather on its island and in a 1-mile radius from the shore, with the effect of a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Control Weather] ritual. This altered weather surrounds the island in thick fog, seaborne mirages, or other phenomena that increase the DC of checks to locate and navigate to the island (Such as Sailing Lore or Survival) to 40, though the oni can allow allies to pass freely. If the oni dies or leaves the island, the weather returns to normal immediately.

Rain falls in a @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60-foot radius emanation}, centered on the oni, for 1 minute, filling the air and pooling on the ground. Creatures in the aura gain weakness 10 to electricity, and the entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground or Climbing, unless they also have a swim Speed. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Conductive Downpour]

The target takes @Damage[6d6[electricity]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|basic] save. On a failure, the creature is also impaled on the spear. The island oni doesn't need to use additional actions to keep the creature grabbed; the creature remains grabbed as long as it's impaled. The grabbed creature can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape] as normal. The island oni can only have one creature impaled this way at a time.

A creature that enters the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:19] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure) and is then temporarily immune for 1 minute. A genie (with the exception of another jann) takes a –4 circumstance penalty to its save.

abilities.name: Elemental Resistance
abilities.effect_text: The jann's elemental resistance applies to cold, electricity, and fire damage, as well as all damage from elemental sources (including environmental damage from the elemental planes and damage from anything with the air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood trait).

Air @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Tailwind], 1d4 electricity; Earth @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pummeling Rubble], 1d4 bludgeoning; Fire @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Breathe Fire], 1d4 fire; Metal @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Thunderstrike], 1d4 electricity; Water @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hydraulic Push], 1d4 bludgeoning; Wood @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Summon Plant or Fungus], 1d4 piercing.

This has no cost. That creature specifies what they wish for, but the interpretation is up to the jann. A jann typically attempts to grant wishes in a way that encourages growth and exploration. A summoned jann can't use this ability.

While this process is lengthy, it's also unobtrusive and can be performed while @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide]{Hiding}. Jinkins prefer to use this ability on magic items. The curse makes the item unreliable (@Check[flat|dc:5] check or waste any action to Interact with or Activate the item), adds a bizarre requirement to use the item, or imparts some other curse of a similar caliber.

Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:41] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure) for 1 round. Regardless of the result, a creature is then temporarily immune to Captivating Display for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Draconic Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

abilities.name: Draconic Momentum
abilities.effect_text: The dragon recharges their Hallucinatory Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

abilities.name: Hallucinatory Breath
abilities.effect_text: The dragon breathes a cloud that assaults the senses and deals @Damage[17d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:50] (@Check[will|dc:41|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused] for 1 round (1 minute on a critical failure) and is then temporarily immune to being confused by Hallucinatory Breath for 1 hour. The dragon can't use Hallucinatory Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hallucinatory Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Lunging Bite

abilities.name: Sneak Attack

This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage modifiers with their Strikes, but it might change the damage type their Strikes deal. Unless they choose to manifest their web wrappings in their new form, they cannot make web wrappings Strikes. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Shepherd's Touch
abilities.effect_text: A morrigna's Strikes affect incorporeal creatures as though etched with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ghost Touch] property rune and deal @Damage[4d6[void]] damage to living creatures or @Damage[4d6[vitality]] damage to undead.

abilities.name: Spider Minions
abilities.effect_text: The morrigna summons a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Giant Tarantula] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Spider Swarm]. These spiders have the summoned trait and remain for 10 minutes or until reduced to 0 Hit Points, whichever comes first. The morrigna does not need to Sustain the Spell to direct these summoned creatures, and the morrigna can have any number of summoned spiders in existence at once. The morrigna can see through the eyes of any of their summoned spiders at any time.

abilities.name: Wrappings Lash
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within reach of the morrigna's web wrappings uses an action to Strike or attempt a skill check Effect The morrigna makes a web wrappings Strike against the triggering creature. If the strike is a critical hit, the triggering action is disrupted.

abilities.name: Bean Panic
abilities.effect_text: Oni are curiously afraid of beans, especially as the seasons begin to change. If a creature Interacts to throw a handful of beans at the oni, the oni becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. While frightened this way, their weakness to spirit damage is increased by 5. The oni then becomes immune to bean panic for 24 hours.

This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Thundering Iron
abilities.effect_text: The oni lifts their tetsubo and brings it down in a deafening peal. They make a tetsubo Strike. On a success, the target takes an additional 1d10 sonic damage. Each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:10] around the target, other than the oni, take this damage as well and is pushed 5 feet away from the target.

abilities.name: Partitioned Anatomy
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The mukradi would be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Confused], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned] Effect The mukradi confines the debilitating effect to a certain portion of its nervous system, ignoring the effect but causing a maw of its choice to go dormant for the effect's duration. That maw can't be used for a Strike or to Breathe Energy during that time. This ability can't be used if all the mukradi's heads are dormant.

abilities.name: Spitting Rage
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature scores a critical hit on the mukradi Effect The mukradi's Breathe Energy recharges. It can use Breathe Energy immediately as part of this reaction. It can't use this reaction again until it recharges Breathe Energy naturally.

abilities.name: Breathe Energy
abilities.effect_text: The mukradi breathes a blast of energy from one of its three heads; each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect] save. The mukradi can't Breathe Energy again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breathe Energy]]{1d4 rounds}. Acid Maw (acid) 10-foot-wide, @Template[line|distance:60|width:10] of acid dealing @Damage[16d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage. Flame Maw (fire) @Template[cone|distance:60] of fire dealing @Damage[16d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage. Shock Maw (electricity) @Template[line|distance:120] of electricity dealing @Damage[16d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage.

abilities.name: Pull Apart
abilities.effect_text: The mukradi makes two Strikes with different maws against the same target. If both hit, the target takes an extra @Damage[(2d12+13)[slashing]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|dc:36|basic] save. On a critical failure, the creature is torn to pieces and dies. The mukradi's multiple attack penalty increases only after all the attacks are made.

abilities.name: Thrash
abilities.effect_text: The mukradi Strikes once against each creature in its reach. It can make one of these Strikes with each of its maws, one with its tail lash, and the rest with its legs. Each attack takes a –2 circumstance penalty and counts toward the mukradi's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks are made.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Huge or smaller, leg, @Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.name: Knockdown
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Knockdown]

abilities.name: Alchemical Weakness
abilities.effect_text: The guardian's weakness to alchemical items not only applies to damage from alchemical items, but the guardian also takes 5 damage when splashed with non-damaging alchemical items or dosed with alchemical poisons, even if they're immune to their other effects.

abilities.name: Blighted Consumption
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within 30 feet eats or drinks (including an alchemical item or potion) Effect The food or drink burns like the caustic substances fed to the mummy before its death. If the creature fails a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save, they become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} after they finish the consumption and can't reduce their sickened condition while within 30 feet of any mummy.

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Choking Pain
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The mummy's last action was a successful fist Strike Effect The mummy shares the pain of its dying moments with the target of that Strike. That creature takes @Damage[3d8[void]] damage with a @Check[will|dc:24|basic] save. If the creature critically fails the saving throw, it can't speak for 1 round, including to Cast a Spell.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality
Reactive Strike (Special)
abilities.effect_text: The mummy pharaoh can use Reactive Strike when a creature within its reach uses a concentrate action, in addition to its normal trigger. It can disrupt triggering concentrate actions, and it disrupts actions on any hit, not just a critical hit. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.effect_text: When a mummy pharaoh is destroyed, necromantic energies rebuild its body in its tomb over [[/gmr 1d10 #Days to Rejuvenate]]{1d10 days}. If the body is destroyed during that time, the process starts anew. A reforming mummy pharaoh is destroyed permanently if their tomb is consecrated.

abilities.name: Sacred Wrappings
abilities.effect_text: When a creature deals physical damage to the pharaoh or triggers one of the pharaoh's weaknesses, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 1}. Regardless of the results of the save, the creature is then immune to that mummy's sacred wrappings for 24 hours.

abilities.name: Undead Mastery
abilities.effect_text: 100 feet. Commanded or allied undead in the aura that have a lower level than the mummy pharaoh gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, AC, saves, and skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Undead Mastery]

abilities.name: Sandstorm Wrath
abilities.effect_text: The mummy pharaoh exhales a @Template[cone|distance:60] of superheated sand that deals @Damage[5d6[fire],5d6[slashing]|options:area-damage]{5d6 fire damage and 5d6 slashing damage} (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). The mummy pharaoh can't use Sandstorm Wrath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Sandstorm Wrath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Veil of Sand
abilities.effect_text: Sand whirls around the mummy pharaoh in a 5-foot emanation until the beginning of their next turn. Creatures inside the sand are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] to those outside it and any living creature ending its turn within the sand takes @Damage[4d6[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save Veil of Sand ends if the mummy takes damage from their water weakness.

abilities.name: Animal Empathy
abilities.effect_text: The naiad can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

abilities.name: Tied to the Land
abilities.effect_text: The queen is tied to a body of water or area with a great deal of water features. A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific region. As long as the queen is healthy, the environment is exceptionally resilient, allowing the nymph queen to automatically attempt to counteract any spell that would harm the environment (such as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Blight] ritual), using her spell DC with a counteract rank equal to the highest-rank druid spell she can cast. When the nymph queen becomes physically or psychologically unhealthy, however, her warded region eventually becomes twisted or unhealthy as well. In that case, restoring the nymph queen swiftly heals the entire region.

abilities.name: Constant Spells
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ConstantSpells]

abilities.name: Nymph's Beauty
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1} and becomes stunned 1 each time it starts its turn within the aura for the next 24 hours, even if it can't see the naiad queen. Creatures that start their turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:23|options:area-effect,inflicts:stunned] save or suffer an effect described in the nymph queen's entry.

abilities.name: Water Healing
abilities.effect_text: For every 10 minutes a naiad spends soaking in any body of water in her domain, she regains @Damage[30[healing]]{30 Hit Points}.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a more humanoid-looking version of their natural form. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Focus Beauty
abilities.effect_text: If a target already affected by nymph's beauty fails its save, the image of the queen sears into the creature's mind, effectively blinding the creature until its vision is restored with sound body or a similar effect. The naiad queen can Dismiss the effect. The nymph queen focuses her beauty upon a target, who must attempt a save against her nymph's beauty aura (@Check[will|dc:23] save). If the creature fails and was already affected by the aura, it takes a greater effect described in the nymph queen's entry. A nymph queen can Focus Beauty on a given creature only once per turn.

abilities.name: Inspiration
abilities.effect_text: The nymph queen inspires a single intelligent creature by giving that creature a token of her favor, typically a lock of her hair, though it can be some other significant object as well. As long as the creature carries her token and remains in good standing with her, the creature gains a +1 status bonus to all Crafting checks, Performance checks, and Will saves. If the nymph grants her token to a bard, and she's the bard's muse, the queen chooses one additional benefit granted by her token: a +1 status bonus to all Lore checks, a +2 status bonus to Performance checks when determining the effects of compositions, a +4 status bonus to untrained skill checks, or a +2 status bonus to Will saves against fey. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Nymph Queen's Inspiration]

abilities.name: Masterful Quickened Casting

abilities.name: Nessari Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:43] Maximum Duration 10 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} (1 round) Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 3} (1 round)

abilities.name: Shape Devils
abilities.effect_text: The nessari reshapes a large number of orts within a 600-foot emanation into more powerful devils to swell Hell's legions. The nessari must have available the number of orts listed on the table below. Devil Level Number of Orts 4 or below 4 5-6 8 7-8 16 9-10 32 11-12 64 13-14 128 15-16 256 17-18 512 19-20 1.024 The nessari can shape 100 orts per day, to a maximum of 1,100 orts in 11 days. Devils created in this way are in thrall to the nessari and follow its orders, with the exception of created nessaris or other devils of similar power, which are always independent. As a result, few nessaris choose to create peers. At the end of the Shape Devils activity, the nessari attempts an incredibly hard @Check[religion] check of the desired devil's level, with results as follows. Critical Success The nessari shapes two devils from the massed orts instead of one. Success The nessari shapes a devil of the desired type and level. Failure The devil shaped from the orts is 2 levels lower than the intended devil. Critical Failure The nessari fails to shape any devils and draws the ire of an archdevil for its waste of resources.

abilities.effect_text: 15 feet. The nightmare continually exhales black smoke. Creatures within the aura are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] to those outside it, and creatures outside the aura are concealed to creatures within it. Nightmares and their riders can see through this smoke. A creature that begins its turn in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened|traits:inhaled,poison] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}. It's then temporarily immune to being sickened by the smoke for 1 minute. This is an inhaled poison, and the nightmare and its rider are immune to it.

abilities.name: Flaming Gallop

Its hooves burst with intense flame, dealing @Damage[3d6[fire]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save to each creature other than the nightmare's rider that the nightmare moves adjacent to during its gallop. Each creature can be affected only once during a single use of Flaming Gallop.

A triumvirate grants the following spells: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cataclysm], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Foresight], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Manifestation](once per day), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pinpoint], and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Revival].

abilities.name: Fated
abilities.effect_text: When a creature is subject to a fortune effect from a norn and a misfortune effect from any source other than a norn (or vice versa), the norn's effect automatically counteracts the other effect and then takes place normally, rather than the two effects canceling each other out. If both the fortune and misfortune effect are from a norn, then the two cancel each other out as normal. At the GM's discretion, powerful entities related to fate or luck, like Desna, Magdh, or Pharasma, can't have their effects negated by this ability.

abilities.name: Sever Fate
abilities.effect_text: When a norn deals void damage with a Strike, she regains @Damage[10[healing]]{10 Hit Points}. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:39] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} on a critical failure). Further void damage dealt by the norn increases the drained condition value by 1 on a failed save (or by 2 on a critical failure), to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 4}.

abilities.name: Shift Fate
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within 120 feet attempts a saving throw Effect The creature rolls the saving throw twice, and then the norn decides which result applies. If the norn chooses the lower roll, this is a misfortune effect; if she chooses the higher roll, it's a fortune effect; if they're the same, she decides which trait to apply.

abilities.name: Snip Thread
abilities.effect_text: Frequency three times per day Effect The norn produces a golden thread linked to the fate of a creature within 100 feet of her, then snips it short with her shears. The target takes @Damage[100[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save). If the target is reduced to 0 Hit Points from this damage, the thread is completely severed and the creature dies immediately. A creature slain by Snip Thread can't be restored to life except by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wish] ritual or similarly powerful magic; or by divine intervention. Regardless of the outcome of their saving throw, a creature targeted by Snip Thread then becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours. The norn can't use Snip Thread again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Snip Thread]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Occult Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Triumvirate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: occult | innate

abilities.name: Lifesense 60 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Lifesense]

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The nosoi takes the appearance of a raven or songbird. This doesn't change its Speed or its attack and damage modifiers with its Strikes. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Haunting Melody
abilities.effect_text: The nosoi croons an entrancing song. Each living or undead creature within a @Template[emanation|distance:60] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save. The effect lasts until the end of the nosoi's next turn, but the nosoi can Sustain it. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune for 24 hours. Despite being a mental effect, this ability affects mindless undead. Psychopomps are immune to this ability. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fascinated] with the nosoi. Critical Failure The creature is fascinated with the nosoi and must spend each of its actions on its turn to move closer to the nosoi as expediently as possible while avoiding obvious dangers. If a fascinated creature is adjacent to the nosoi, it stays still and doesn't act. If the creature is attacked, the fascination ends.

abilities.name: Shepherd's Touch
abilities.effect_text: A nosoi's Strikes have the benefit of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ghost Touch] property rune and deal an additional @Damage[1d6[void]] damage to living creatures or @Damage[1d6[vitality]] damage to undead.

abilities.name: Divine Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: divine | innate

abilities.name: Alchemical Chambers
abilities.effect_text: A noxious needler's body contains six alchemical chambers filled with different substances. When a noxious needler's ability calls upon a randomly determined alchemical effect, roll 1d6 and consult the following (if you roll the result of a chamber that was shattered, there is no alchemical effect): [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Chambers]] Alchemical Effect 1 Acid Damage 2 Cold Damage 3 Electricity Damage 4 Fire Damage 5 Poison Damage 6 Sickness: @Check[fortitude|dc:26|name:Alchemical Sickness|traits:disease] save or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Alchemical Rupture
abilities.effect_text: When a noxious needler takes physical damage from a critical hit or is affected by a shatter spell, one glass chamber within its body shatters, spewing alchemical liquid in a @Template[emanation|distance:5]. Roll on the alchemical chambers list to determine which one shatters—on a roll of 1–5, creatures in the area take 10d6 damage of the appropriate type (DC 28 basic Reflex). On a roll of 6, creatures must instead save against the sickness effect. [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Rupture]] Alchemical Effect 1 @Damage[10d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect|traits:acid] 2 @Damage[10d6[cold]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect|traits:cold] 3 @Damage[10d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect|traits:electricity] 4 @Damage[10d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect|traits:fire] 5 @Damage[10d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect|traits:poison] 6 Sickness: @Check[fortitude|dc:26|name:Alchemical Sickness|options:area-effect|traits:disease] save or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Alchemical Injection
abilities.effect_text: When a noxious needler hits a creature with a syringe Strike, roll 1d6 on the alchemical chambers list to determine the additional effect of the attack. The syringe deals an additional 2d6 damage of the appropriate type (or exposes the target to the sickness effect, as appropriate). [[/gmr 1d6 #Alchemical Injection]] Alchemical Effect 1 @Damage[2d6[acid]] damage 2 @Damage[2d6[cold]] damage 3 @Damage[2d6[electricity]] damage 4 @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage 5 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage 6 Sickness: @Check[fortitude|dc:26|name:Alchemical Sickness|traits:disease] save or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Generate Bomb
abilities.effect_text: The needler fills an empty vial from one of its alchemical chambers to create a bomb and then makes a bomb Strike. Roll 1d6 on the table below. On a roll of 1–5, the bomb deals 3d10 damage and 3 splash damage, matching the damage type of the chamber; you can instead choose to create an alchemical bomb of 11th level or lower that deals the same damage type, such as an acid flask on a roll of 1. On a roll of 6, it creates a sickness bomb, which exposes the target and all creatures in the splash radius to the sickness effect; creatures hit by only the splash receive a +2 circumstance bonus to their Fortitude saves. [[/gmr 1d6 #Generate Bomb]] Alchemical Effect 1 Acid Damage: @Damage[3d10[acid],(3[splash])[acid]] damage 2 Cold Damage: @Damage[3d10[cold],(3[splash])[cold]] damage 3 Electricity Damage: @Damage[3d10[electricity],(3[splash])[electricity]] damage 4 Fire Damage: @Damage[3d10[fire],(3[splash])[fire]] damage 5 Poison Damage: @Damage[3d10[poison],(3[splash])[poison]] damage 6 Sickness: @Check[fortitude|dc:26|name:Alchemical Sickness|traits:disease] save or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure)

abilities.name: Frightful Presence
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. @Check[will|dc:25|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

abilities.name: Purity Vulnerability
abilities.effect_text: Unpolluted fresh water burns a nuckelavee like acid, dealing @Damage[1d6[acid]] damage to it and causing it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}. A nuckelavee can't heal from damage when it's in an area that isn't polluted (subject to GM discretion).

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Blight Breath
abilities.effect_text: The nuckelavee breathes a @Template[cone|distance:30] of foulness, dealing @Damage[8d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage to living creatures in the area with a @Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save. A creature that fails also takes @Damage[2d6[bleed]|options:area-damage] damage. The nuckelavee can't use Blight Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Blight Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Mortasheen
abilities.effect_text: The target can't recover from the fatigued condition caused by mortasheen until the disease is cured. Mortasheen gains the virulent trait against animals and plants Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:28] Stage 1 Carrier with no ill effect (1 day); Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fatigued] (1 day) Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} and fatigued (1 day) Stage 4 dead

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Medium or smaller, hoof, @Check[reflex|dc:28|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.effect_text: Tradition: primal | innate

abilities.name: Refuse Pile
abilities.effect_text: When they're not in danger, an ofalth can spend 1 minute settling into a 10-foot pile that looks like a heap of garbage. Until the next time it takes an action, the ofalth gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC. A creature that enters the area of the garbage heap or interacts with it must attempt a save against the ofalth's stench.

abilities.name: Filth Wallow
abilities.effect_text: An ofalth gains fast healing 2 when in an area with a high concentration of debris or excrement, such as a refuse heap or sewer.

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. @Check[fortitude|dc:28|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Stench]

abilities.name: Wretched Weeps
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:26] Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day) Stage 2 @Damage[2d4[bleed]]{2d4 persistent bleed} every hour and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} (1 day); Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[bleed]]{2d6 persistent bleed} every hour and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 2} (1 day)

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Bellowing Command
abilities.effect_text: The ogre boss issues a command to hasten their fellows. Each ogre ally who hears and understands this command becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Quickened] until the end of that ally's next turn but can use the extra action only to Step or Stride.

abilities.name: Sweeping Hook
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The ogre boss successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Trip]{Trips} a creature using an ogre hook Effect The ogre boss makes an ogre hook Strike against the creature they tripped.

abilities.name: Glutton's Feast
abilities.effect_text: If the ogre glutton damages a living creature with their jaws Strike, they gain 1d4 temporary Hit Points for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Glutton's Feast]

abilities.name: Glutton's Rush
abilities.effect_text: The ogre glutton Strides twice and makes a jaws Strike. If they damage a living creature with this Strike, the temporary Hit Points they receive from Glutton's Feast is increased to 2d4.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.effect_text: Small, @Damage[(2d4+4)[bludgeoning]], Rupture 14 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult
Challenge Fate
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The dragon is targeted by an attack; Effect This fate is not set in stone. The attacker rolls the triggering attack twice and uses the worse result.

abilities.name: Untethered to Fate
abilities.effect_text: The dragon can choose to negate any fortune or misfortune effects that would affect them; other creatures remain affected normally.

abilities.name: Destiny Breath
abilities.effect_text: The dragon breathes a translucent mist of potentialities that overwhelms creatures with visions of possible features, dealing @Damage[10d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[cone|distance:30] (@Check[will|dc:30|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure) as it struggles with the visions. The dragon can't use Destiny Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Destiny Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Prophetic Wings
abilities.effect_text: The dragon or any ally can glimpse into the future through the dragon's wings in a process that requires 10 minutes of concentration. This casts a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Augury] spell, except that the wings can predict results up to 1 month into the future and the dragon always speaks a few cryptic words related to the result of the prediction. The dragon can use their wings in this way only once per day, and a given creature can seek a future in the wings only once per week.

abilities.name: Walk the Timelines
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per hour Effect The dragon splits themself into two versions with different fates. Each copy Strides or Flies from the dragon's current space, then takes a single action. If the actions are both attacks, they use the same multiple attack penalty and count as one attack toward the dragon's multiple attack penalty. After both actions, the dragon chooses one of the two locations as their actual destination and the other version of themself disappears.

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Telepathy]

abilities.name: Cleanly Vulnerability
abilities.effect_text: An omox embodies filth, and they find the concept of cleanliness abhorrent. An omox subjected to an effect that cleans them, such as the tidy command of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Prestidigitation], takes @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage. They also take this damage the first time each round a creature hit by one of the omox's attacks spends actions cleaning off the filth.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Absorb Weapon
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature hits the omox with a melee weapon Effect The omox attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Disarm] the creature. On a critical success, the weapon becomes subsumed within the omox's body rather than falling to the ground. Retrieving the weapon requires Disarming the omox of it.

abilities.name: Liquid Leap
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The omox is in a space of liquid. Effect The omox teleports from its current space to any unoccupied space of liquid within 120 feet.

abilities.name: Slime Trap
abilities.effect_text: A creature hit by an omox's slime ball must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:32] save or take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute or until it [[/act escape dc=35]]{Escapes}. On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} for the same duration. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Slime Trap]

abilities.name: Smother
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The omox has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] Effect The demon flows over the creature, covering it in oozing acidic slime. The creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save or it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] and must hold its breath or begin suffocating. These effects lasts as long as the omox has the creature grabbed or restrained.

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.name: Aquatic Echolocation 120 feet
abilities.effect_text: An orca can use its hearing as a precise sense at the listed range, but only underwater.

abilities.name: Deep Breath
abilities.effect_text: An orca can hold its breath for 2 hours.

abilities.name: Aquatic Ambush
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. An orca can travel no further than 5 feet onto land as part of an Aquatic Ambush. After it does so, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] until it Crawls to return to the water. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AquaticAmbush]

abilities.name: Breach
abilities.effect_text: The orca Swims up to its swim Speed, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Leap] vertically out of the water up to 25 feet in the air, making a Strike against a creature at any point during the jump (this lets it attack a creature within 30 feet of the water's surface). After the Strike, the orca splashes back down into the water.
