abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.GreaterDarkvision]

abilities.name: Subservience
abilities.effect_text: Orts have little drive of their own, but other devils can take command of them. A non-ort devil can issue a command to all orts within 60 feet of it with a single action, which has the auditory and concentrate traits. The devil picks one of the following orders orts can understand, and the orts follow that order. The command and its effects end once the commander is out of the ort's sight, when a new command is issued by the same or another devil, or when the ort dies. Kill The ort attacks one target the commander singles out and gains a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the target. Defend The ort circles the commander and attacks any creature that comes near. It gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and saves. Fetch The ort gains a +10–foot circumstance bonus to its Speed and attempts to get an object or person the commander singles out. It attacks anyone and anything that gets in the way. Work The ort performs drudge work dictated by the commander.

abilities.name: Clobbering Charge
abilities.effect_text: The pachycephalosaurus Strides up to its Speed. If it ends its movement within melee reach of a target, it can make a skull Strike against that target. If the pachycephalosaurus critically hits with this Strike, the creature hit is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1}.

abilities.name: Sudden Shove
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The pachycephalosaurus damages a Medium or smaller foe with its skull Strike Effect The pachycephalosaurus digs in and flings its head up, shoving its foe away. It attempts an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the target's Fortitude DC. Critical Success The pachycephalosaurus pushes the opponent up to 10 feet away from itself and knocks the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]. Success The pachycephalosaurus pushes the opponent back 5 feet. Failure The pachycephalosaurus fails to push the opponent. Critical Failure As failure, but the failed attempt leaves the pachycephalosaurus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] for 1 round.

abilities.name: Fossilization
abilities.effect_text: The first time each round a creature takes damage from the paleohemoth's jaws, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save. If it fails and has not already been slowed by this ability, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute. If the creature was already slowed by this ability, a failed save causes it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Petrified] permanently.

abilities.name: Reassemble
abilities.effect_text: The paleohemoth reorganizes its bones, increasing its reach to 25 feet and reducing its Speed to 15 feet. It can revert to its original form by taking this action again.

abilities.name: Buck
abilities.effect_text: @Check[reflex|dc:19] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Buck]

abilities.name: Assisted Mount
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The pegasus is Flying without a rider. Effect The pegasus Flies. At any point during the movement, it can allow a willing adjacent creature to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Mount] it. That creature must use a reaction to do so.

abilities.name: Gallop
abilities.effect_text: The pegasus uses 2 move actions, each of which can be either Stride or Fly. It gains a +20-foot circumstance bonus to its Speeds during a Gallop.

abilities.name: Naturally Invisible
abilities.effect_text: The phade is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] at all times, though when it takes a hostile action of any kind, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] instead of undetected until the start of its next turn, as the vague outline of its humanoid form is faintly visible for a short period of time.

abilities.name: Hush
abilities.effect_text: The phade calms the air in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] until the beginning of its next turn, reducing sounds in it to a whisper that can't be heard outside the emanation. This doesn't prevent casting spells, but a phade attempts to counteract any auditory or sonic effect originating in the area with a [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17} counteract modifier. If the counteract attempt fails, Hush ends early.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.effect_text: The phade deals 2d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] creatures.

abilities.name: Telepathy 100 feet
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Telepathy]

abilities.name: Walk the Ethereal Line
abilities.effect_text: The phantom walks the thin line between the Ethereal and Universe in order to exist on both planes simultaneously. They can shift back to solely the Ethereal Plane by using this ability again.

abilities.name: -1 Status to All Saves vs. Death Effects
Susceptible to Death
abilities.effect_text: Though phantoms aren't alive, neither are they undead, and they are uniquely vulnerable to the effects of death. A phantom whose Hit Points are reduced to 0 as a result of a death effect (such as from a spell like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Execute]) is immediately whisked away to the River of Souls, where their soul resumes the usual path to the afterlife.

abilities.name: Phantom Touch
abilities.effect_text: Each time they make a Strike, a phantom can choose to deal spirit damage instead of the normal physical damage type.

abilities.name: Grab Item
abilities.effect_text: The phantom beast attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Steal] one item of up to 1 Bulk from a creature, even if the creature is in combat, though the object still must not be one that is actively in use. If they succeed, they carry the object along with them telekinetically.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Ward Contract
abilities.effect_text: A signed contract carried by a living contract devil (including draped over its horns) is immune to damage from all creatures other than that contract devil. A contract devil is immune to mental effects that would make it destroy, nullify, or alter a contract.

abilities.name: Draft Contract
abilities.effect_text: The contract devil produces an infernal contract for a single living mortal. This contract can grant a wide range of abilities and effects, akin to the power of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wish] ritual but fulfilled to the letter by the contract devil. To receive any of those benefits, the mortal must willingly sign its true name to the contract. At that point, the mortal's soul is bound to the contract devil and Hell. While the contract is in effect, the victim can't be restored to life except by wish or similar magic. If the mortal is restored to life by those means, the contract devil knows which mortal came to life and can locate the creature or creatures who restored the mortal to life for 1 year, gaining the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Locate] spell with unlimited range. Avoiding the terms of an infernal contract is difficult and often dangerous.

abilities.name: Infernal Investment
abilities.effect_text: A contract devil can cast a 10th-rank innate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Scrying] spell at will, but only to target a creature with which they have a contract. The target automatically critically fails its save.

abilities.name: Infernal Wound
abilities.effect_text: The wounds from a contract devil's Strikes resist healing. A spellcaster or item attempting to use healing magic on a creature suffering first attempts to counteract infernal wound (DC 29). If it is not counteracted, the healing has no effect.

abilities.name: Self-Resurrection
abilities.effect_text: When a phoenix dies, they collapse into a pile of smoldering ashes before returning to life fully healed [[/gmr 1d4 #Self-Resurrection Time]]{1d4 rounds} later, as if subject to a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Resurrect] ritual. Self-resurrection happens only if there are some remains to resurrect; for instance, a phoenix killed by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Disintegrate] spell can't use this ability. A phoenix whose remains rest within an area devoted to an unholy deity by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Consecrate] can't self-resurrect until their remains are no longer in that area. A phoenix can self-resurrect only once per year.

abilities.name: Shroud of Flame
abilities.effect_text: 20 feet. @Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage], @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic|options:area-effect] save. While this aura is active, any adjacent creature that hits the phoenix with a melee attack or otherwise touches them takes @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage. The phoenix can activate or deactivate the aura with a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

abilities.name: Flaming Strafe
abilities.effect_text: The phoenix blazes with superheated flame and Flies up to their Speed. They deal @Damage[6d6[fire]] damage to each creature within 20 feet of each square they move through (@Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save).

abilities.name: Rapid Erudition

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Sprinkle Pixie Dust
abilities.effect_text: The pixie sprinkles pixie dust onto one of their arrows. If the pixie hits a creature with that arrow before the pixie's next turn, the arrow inflicts one of the following special effects of the pixie's choice instead of dealing damage. Each effect depends on the target's @Check[will|dc:21] save. On a critical hit, the target gets a result one degree worse than it rolled. Charm (emotion, incapacitation, mental) The arrow has the effect of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Charm] spell, except the target doesn't gain a bonus to its save if the only hostile act was the pixie firing its bow, and the pixie can choose to direct the target's adoration toward another creature rather than itself. Memory Loss (mental) On a failed Will save, the target loses the last 5 minutes of its memory. Sleep (incapacitation, mental, sleep) The target suffers the effects of a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sleep] spell. Subdual (mental, nonlethal) The target takes @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage, depending on its basic Will save.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18] Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day) Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day) Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day) Stage 4 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day) Stage 5 dead, rising as a plague zombie immediately

They don't need to share a language, though the aeon's meaning to non-aeons can be vague and is often mysterious. An aeon can use this ability to communicate flawlessly with any other aeon on the same plane as itself.

abilities.name: Reality Twist
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The pleroma critically fails a saving throw Effect The critical failure becomes a normal failure.

abilities.name: Generate Sphere
abilities.effect_text: The pleroma manifests a 2-foot-diameter sphere of energy—either a white sphere of creation that hovers above their left hand or a black sphere of oblivion above their right. This action has the vitality trait for a sphere of creation or the void trait for a sphere of oblivion. A sphere vanishes after 1 minute, when it is more than 300 feet from the pleroma, or when the pleroma Generates a Sphere of that type again. A sphere of oblivion winks out of existence when it vanishes, but a sphere of creation explodes in blinding light—each creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:43] save or be permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded]. This is a light effect.

abilities.name: Propel Sphere
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The pleroma has a sphere of creation or sphere of oblivion active Effect The pleroma makes one of its spheres fly 10 feet in any direction, ignoring difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain. A sphere of creation creates new matter in its path, which the pleroma can have manifest as normal terrain, difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, or a cube of solid mater (such as clay, wood, or stone). A sphere of oblivion destroys unattended objects it touches, though larger objects are destroyed at a rate of one 10-foot cube per round of contact. The sphere can enter the space of a creature; when it does, the creature takes 20d6 damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:43] save. This is an incapacitation effect. Success The creature takes no damage and is pushed out of the sphere to the nearest open space of the GM's choice. Failure The creature takes full damage; this is @Damage[20d6[vitality]]{vitality} damage for a sphere of creation or @Damage[20d6[void]]{void} damage for a sphere of oblivion, but it can damage any type of creature regardless of its normal immunities. The creature is then pushed out of the sphere as on a success. A creature reduced to 0 HP is slain instead of being pushed out, either merged with new matter for a sphere of creation or completely destroyed for a void of oblivion; the creature can be restored only via a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wish] ritual or similarly powerful effect. This is a death effect. Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage.

abilities.name: Site Bound
abilities.effect_text: A poltergeist is tied to a location and can't travel more than 120 feet from the place where it was created or formed. Some poltergeists are instead bound to a specific room, building, or similar area

abilities.name: Natural Invisibility
abilities.effect_text: A poltergeist is naturally @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible]. It becomes visible only when it uses Frighten.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.effect_text: When a poltergeist is destroyed, it reforms, fully healed, where it was destroyed after [[/br 2d4 #Rejuvenation]]{2d4 days}. A poltergeist can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

abilities.name: Telekinetic Defense
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature approaches within 10 feet of the poltergeist Effect The poltergeist makes a telekinetic object Strike against the triggering creature.

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Frighten
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The poltergeist must be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] Effect The poltergeist becomes visible, appearing as a skeletal, ghostlike humanoid. Each creature within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2} on a failure. On a critical failure, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fleeing] for as long as it's frightened. On a success, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute. At the start of its next turn, the poltergeist becomes invisible again.

abilities.name: Telekinetic Storm
abilities.effect_text: The poltergeist telekinetically throws numerous small objects, such as dozens of pieces of silverware or books, either spreading them out among multiple foes or directing them at one target. When this effect is spread out among multiple foes, the poltergeist makes a telekinetic object Strike at a -2 penalty against each creature within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet}. These count as one attack for the poltergeist's multiple attack penalty, and the penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks. When this effect has only one target, the poltergeist makes a telekinetic object Strike against the target, and the damage increases to 3d12. It deals @Damage[1d12[untyped]] damage on a failure, and no damage on a critical failure.

abilities.name: Jaunt
abilities.effect_text: The poracha teleports up to 40 feet to a location it can see. It can't use Jaunt again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Jaunt]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Object Meld
abilities.effect_text: The poracha touches an adjacent object of enough volume to contain it. It merges into the object indefinitely, and while it's inside, time moves exceptionally slowly for it and it has only limited perception of the outside world. The poracha can sense what's going on outside the object only using tremorsense. The poracha can use only mental actions or Jaunt; if it Jaunts, it leaves the object and appears where it chooses. If a creature Strikes the object, the poracha is expelled unharmed.

abilities.effect_text: A sinspawn can smell creatures that reflect its sin as the scent ability. The GM determines which creatures are appropriately sinful. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Scent]

On a failure, the creature must roll twice and take the worse result on all checks as long as it's within the aura. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Unluck Aura]

The DC present here is a moderate DC for the creature level according to the GM Core creature building Tables

abilities.name: Change Shape

In porcupine form, their size changes to Medium, they lose their weapon Strikes, and they gain a quill Strike (+18 for 2d8+6 piercing plus 1d8 persistent poison). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.effect_text: When a pusk regains their actions, roll [[/gmr 1d4 #Actions Regained]]{1d4}. The pusk regains that many actions for the turn (to a maximum of 3, or 2 if the pusk is a minion). Effects like the slowed condition can further reduce their number of actions.

abilities.name: Cower

This lasts until the pusk moves from its current space, falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious], or ends the effect as a free action.

abilities.name: Frenzied Slashes
abilities.effect_text: The pusk makes three claw Strikes, each at a –2 penalty, all targeting the same creature. The pusk's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it has made all three attacks. The pusk gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} condition until the beginning of its next turn.

abilities.name: Vicious Criticals
abilities.effect_text: A pusk makes the most of any weakness it finds. Whenever a pusk scores a critical hit with its claw Strike, the target takes an additional @Damage[1d6[bleed]]{1d6 persistent bleed} damage.

abilities.name: Tighten Coils
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] by the python attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape]. Effect The DC of the Escape check is increased by 2.

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.effect_text: @Damage[(1d8)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

abilities.name: Wrap in Coils
abilities.effect_text: Requirements A Medium or smaller creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] in the python's jaws. Effect The python moves the creature into its coils, freeing its jaws to make attacks, then uses Constrict against the creature. The python's coils can hold one creature.

Archon's Protection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger An enemy damages the archon's ally and both are within 15 feet of the archon Effect The ally gains resistance 5 to all damage against the triggering damage and the archon can make a Strike against the enemy.

abilities.name: Archon's Pursuit
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Requirements The qarna saw another creature teleport within the last round and has at least one @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Translocate] spell remaining Effect The qarna casts one of their translocate spells, which is heightened to 5th rank and causes the qarna to arrive in an unoccupied space it chooses within 30 feet of the creature it's pursuing. If the creature is too far away, the qarna arrives as close as possible.

abilities.name: Distracting Arrow
abilities.effect_text: The qarna makes a composite longbow Strike. If it hits, the arrow lodges in the target and that creature's senses focus on the archon, leaving all else blurry. That creature takes a –2 status penalty to attack rolls and Perception checks against any target other than the qarna. The creature can Interact to remove the arrow, which ends the effect.

abilities.name: Touch of Charity
abilities.effect_text: The qarna touches a willing living creature to take on that creature's wounds. The qarna transfers up to 30 of their own HP to the touched creature. (The qarna can't transfer more HP than they currently have.)

abilities.name: Mist Vision
abilities.effect_text: The quai dau to ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] condition from mist and fog.

abilities.name: Frightful Sight
abilities.effect_text: 60 feet. This aura functions as a @Check[will|dc:32|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] frightful presence aura, but a creature doesn't attempt its save until it sees the quai dau to. @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

abilities.name: Reflective Scales
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within 30 feet casts a spell with the light trait or uses an ability with the light trait Effect The quai dau to adjusts its position to reflect the light off their scales in a blinding display. All creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:30] must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:33] saving throw or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round.

abilities.name: Drain Water
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The quai dau to is within 10 feet of a body of water that's at least 10 feet deep and their water sac is empty Effect The quai dau to sucks water through their trunk to fill their water sac, lowering the level in the body of water by 10 feet. All creatures in the water within a @Template[emanation|distance:30] are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] until the start of the quai dau to's next turn.

abilities.name: Inflate
abilities.effect_text: The quai dau to inflates their body. They become Gargantuan, gain a fly Speed of 30 feet until the end of their next turn, and then Fly. They deflate if they fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] or Dismiss this effect.

abilities.name: Mist Breath
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The quai dau to's water sac is full Effect The quai dau to empties their water sac to breathe out mist in a @Template[emanation|distance:10]. All creatures within the mist become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and all creatures outside the mist become concealed to creatures within it. The mist dissipates after 1 round.

abilities.name: Spout Water
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The quai dau to's water sac is full Effect The quai dau to empties its water sac to blast water from its trunk, dealing @Damage[9d10[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[line|distance:90], with a @Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save. A creature that fails is pushed 10 feet (or 20 feet on a critical failure).

abilities.name: Emotional Focus

abilities.name: Emotional Frenzy
abilities.effect_text: The quelaunt casts up to three spells chosen from its at-will innate spells and its emotional focus spells.

abilities.name: Feed on Emotion
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round; Effect The quelaunt feeds on the emotional unrest of a single creature within 30 feet that's under a harmful emotion effect. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:37] save or take @Damage[4d10[mental]] damage and be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned] for 1 round. If the target fails its saving throw, the quelaunt regains the same number of Hit Points and regains the action it spent to Feed on Emotion. It can't use the regained action to Feed on Emotion again.

abilities.name: Rapid Strikes
abilities.effect_text: The quelaunt makes three melee Strikes, each against a different target within reach. The multiple attack penalty applies to each attack but increases only after all the attacks have been made.

abilities.name: Spiral of Despair
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature fails a saving throw to resist one of the quelaunt's innate spells or emotional focus spells Effect As the quelaunt invades the triggering creature's mind and plants the seeds of negative emotions, it also strips away the target's feelings of hope or positivity. The quelaunt can immediately end a single emotion effect from which the triggering creature is benefiting.

abilities.name: Swarming Bites
abilities.effect_text: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[1d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:17|basic|options:area-effect] save. A creature that fails its save is exposed to putrid plague.

abilities.name: Alchemical Grenades
abilities.effect_text: The grenadier carries 6 alchemical grenades that deal either acid, cold, or fire damage plus 2 persistent damage and 2 splash damage of the same type (typically two of each). The grenadier replenishes these each day using scavenged materials.

abilities.name: Cheek Pouches
abilities.effect_text: A ratfolk grenadier has stretchy cheek pouches that can store up to 1 cubic foot of objects (though no more than 4 light items). The ratfolk can remove or store an item using the Interact action. As long as the ratfolk has at least one object in their cheek pouches, their speech is noticeably difficult to understand.

abilities.name: Quick Grenadier
abilities.effect_text: The ratfolk grenadier draws an alchemical grenade with an Interact action and throws it as a ranged Strike.

abilities.name: Quick Stow
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Effect The ratfolk grenadier stores one held item of light or negligible Bulk in its cheek pouches.

abilities.name: Swarming
abilities.effect_text: A ratfolk grenadier can end its movement in the same square as an ally that also has this ability. Only two such creatures can share the same space.

abilities.name: Red Cap
abilities.effect_text: A redcap's woolen hat is dyed with the blood of their victims. If the redcap loses their cap, they no longer benefit from fast healing and take a –4 status penalty to their damage rolls. They can create a new cap in 10 minutes, but that cap doesn't grant them powers until the redcap has turned it red with Blood Soak. A cap has no benefit for creatures other than the redcap who made it. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Lost Red Cap]

abilities.name: Fast Healing 10
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FastHealing]

abilities.name: Divine Revulsion
abilities.effect_text: If a redcap sees a creature brandish a religious symbol of a deity (which requires an Interact action by that creature) or cast a divine spell while wearing a religious symbol, the redcap must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19] save. They then become temporarily immune to all brandished religious symbols for 10 minutes. Critical Success The redcap is unaffected. Success The redcap is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Failure The redcap gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fleeing] condition for 1 round and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 4}.

abilities.name: Blood Soak
abilities.effect_text: The redcap dips their cap in the blood of a slain foe. The foe must have died in the last minute, and the redcap must have helped kill it. The redcap gains a +4 status bonus to damage rolls for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Blood Soak]

abilities.name: Deadly Cleave
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The redcap reduces a creature to 0 Hit Points with a halberd Strike Effect The redcap makes another halberd Strike against a different creature, using the same multiple attack penalty as the halberd Strike that triggered this reaction. This counts toward their multiple attack penalty as normal.

abilities.name: Stomp
abilities.effect_text: The redcap Strides up to half its Speed and makes a boot Strike at any point during that movement. If the boot Strike hits a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] creature, it deals an extra @Damage[2d6[bleed]].

abilities.name: Death Frenzy

abilities.name: Courageous Switch

abilities.name: Holy Armament

abilities.name: Terrifying Smite

On a hit, the target takes an additional 2d8 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. abilities.name: Sense Murderer
abilities.effect_text: A revenant knows the direction of their murderer (as long as both are on the same plane), but not the distance.

abilities.name: Self-Loathing
abilities.effect_text: If a revenant sees their own reflection or any object that was important to them in life, they must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save. Critical Success The revenant is unaffected and can no longer be affected by that reflection or object in this way. Success The revenant is distracted by self-loathing and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. Failure The revenant becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fascinated] by the source that triggered their self-loathing and does everything they can to destroy it until the end of the revenant's next turn. Critical Failure The revenant becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] as long as the source of their self-loathing is apparent, until they're attacked, or until they see their murderer.

abilities.name: Undying Vendetta
abilities.effect_text: If the revenant's murderer dies, the revenant is immediately destroyed. A revenant that can't sense their murderer must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:11] check once every 24 hours to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]; they immediately rise again once they can sense their murderer. A murderer who becomes undead does not trigger the revenant's destruction until the murderer is finally destroyed. The revenant gains a +2 status bonus to checks and DCs against their murderer.

abilities.name: Void Healing

abilities.name: Baleful Shriek

Regardless of the outcome of their saving throw, affected creatures are then immune to Baleful Shriek for 1 hour. The revenant's murderer never improves their degree of success due to this ability's incapacitation trait. The revenant can't use Baleful Shriek again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Baleful Shriek]]{1d4 rounds}. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Failure The creature is frightened 2 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] for 1 round. Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and paralyzed for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: No Breath
abilities.effect_text: A rhu-chalik doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing (such as inhaled poisons).

abilities.name: Excruciating Enzyme
abilities.effect_text: A rhu-chalik's tendrils secrete an enzyme that causes intense pain. A living creature hit by a tendril Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} from the pain.

abilities.name: Label Memories
abilities.effect_text: The rhu-chalik invades the mind of a target within 100 feet, sorting the memories into alien structures for transmission. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save. Critical Success The target creature is unaffected and temporarily immune to Label Memories for 1 minute. Success The target is unaffected. abilities.name: Sea Hag's Bargain
abilities.effect_text: The sea hag can make a bargain with a willing creature who must be of sound mind. The creature gives away a special or cherished quality—such as its courage, its beauty, or its voice. In exchange, the sea hag spends 1 minute polymorphing the creature into a form the target desires. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Change Shape]. It might be a total transformation or just changing one or more aspects of the target's body, and it can't make the creature more than one size smaller or larger. The creature changes its Speeds as appropriate for the new form. It doesn't change the attack and damage bonuses with its Strikes, but it might change the damage type the Strikes deal. This has an unlimited duration, and as long as it's transformed, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} and can't reduce its sickened condition below 2. The creature can slowly and carefully eat and drink despite being sickened. The only way to restore the lost quality used as payment is to defeat the sea hag or make another bargain for its return. Ending the bargain in this way also removes the transformation.

abilities.effect_text: Attacks against the shadow are treated as magical if made by a creature who is in magical light or with an object that is in magical light (such as from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Light] spell).

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Shadow Spawn
abilities.effect_text: When a creature's shadow is pulled free by Steal Shadow, it becomes a shadow spawn under the command of the shadow that created it. This @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Shadow Spawn] doesn't have Steal Shadow and is perpetually and incurably @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}. If the creature the shadow spawn was pulled from dies, the shadow spawn becomes a full-fledged, autonomous shadow. If the creature recovers from its enfeeblement, its shadow returns to it and the shadow spawn is extinguished.

abilities.name: Slink in Shadows
abilities.effect_text: The shadow can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide] or end its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak] in a creature's or object's shadow.

abilities.name: Steal Shadow
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The shadow hit a living creature with a shadow hand Strike on its previous action Effect The shadow pulls at the target's shadow, making the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1}. This is cumulative with other enfeebled conditions from shadows, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 4}. If this increases a creature's enfeebled value to 3 or more, the target's shadow is separated from its body (see shadow spawn). The enfeebled value from Steal Shadow decreases by 1 every hour.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Paralyzing Gaze
abilities.effect_text: 30 feet. A non-demon creature that ends its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:35|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:paralyzed] save. If it fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, and if it critically fails, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] for 1 round.

abilities.name: Succor Vulnerability
abilities.effect_text: A shemhazian's mutilation is a part of them, and they can't bear to see it reversed. The first time each round that a creature heals from damage the shemhazian dealt on their last turn, the demon takes @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature within reach of the shemhazian's tail leaves a square during a move action it's using Effect The shemhazian attempts to [[/act trip]] the triggering creature. On a success, the creature also takes damage as if the shemhazian had hit with a tail Strike, and if the creature was flying, it falls 30 feet.

abilities.name: Enfeebling Bite
abilities.effect_text: If the shemhazian's jaws Strike damages a creature, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 3} for 24 hours. The target can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|options:inflicts:enfeebled] save to reduce this to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} (or be unaffected on a critical success).

abilities.name: Focused Gaze
abilities.effect_text: The shemhazian focuses their gaze on a non-demon creature they can see within 30 feet. If that creature isn't already @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed] by the shemhazian's paralyzing gaze, it must attempt a save against the shemhazian's paralyzing gaze. If that creature is slowed, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35|options:inflicts:paralyzed] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed] for 1 round. A shemhazian can't use this ability against the same creature more than once per round.

abilities.name: Skeletal Lore
abilities.effect_text: A skulltaker taps into the memories of the creatures whose bones make up its body. This gives it the Skeletal Lore skill, which it can use to Recall Knowledge of any kind. In addition, it can speak and understand all the languages known by the creatures whose bones make up its body (typically including Common and the regional language of the skulltaker's home region). The skulltaker can use Skeletal Lore as the primary skill check for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Collective Memories] ritual, and it can cast collective memories without secondary casters.

abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality
Shard Storm
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. A cloud of bone shards surrounds the skulltaker. When a creature moves into the emanation or begins its turn there, shard storm deals @Damage[4d6[slashing],4d6[void]]{4d6 slashing damage and 4d6 void damage} to the creature, with a @Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save. If the creature has resistance or immunity to void damage, or an effect that protects it against death effects, or an effect that protects it against the doomed or drained condition, the creature must first succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] save or have all such benefits suppressed for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Bonetaker
abilities.effect_text: Whenever a creature dies within 60 feet of a skulltaker, the skulltaker draws a portion of the creature's bones into its shard storm. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] save or rise as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Skeletal Champion] in [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. These skeletal champions are controlled by the skulltaker.

abilities.name: Splintered Ground
abilities.effect_text: The skulltaker causes splintered bones to erupt from all solid surfaces in a @Template[emanation|distance:100], except for surfaces of worked stone. A creature moving through the bones takes @Damage[10[piercing],10[void]|options:area-damage]{10 piercing damage and 10 void damage} for every 5 feet of movement. The first time each round a creature takes piercing damage from these splintered bones, it must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:40|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save or take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to all Speeds for 10 minutes, or a –15-foot circumstance penalty for 24 hours on a critical failure. The bones remain in place until the skulltaker uses this action again or the bones are manually removed, which takes 10 minutes for each 5-foot square. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Splintered Ground] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Splintered Ground (Critical Failure)]

abilities.name: Vitality Drain
abilities.effect_text: When a skulltaker hits with a melee Strike, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 1}.

The DC to [[/act balance dc=18]] across the slime is 18.

abilities.name: Entangling Slime
abilities.effect_text: A creature struck by a slurk's slime squirt becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} and takes a –5-foot penalty to Speed for 1 hour or until the slime is removed. The slime can be removed with a total of three Interact actions by the entangled creature or creatures adjacent to the creature. These actions don't need to be consecutive or made by the same creature. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Entangling Slime]

abilities.name: Coils of Knowledge
abilities.effect_text: The naga's grip is more spiritual than physical. A creature hit by a smaranava's tail must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] by the tail until they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape], the naga releases them with an Interact action, or the naga dies. A captive takes a –4 status penalty to Escape, but can choose to attempt an Occultism or Religion check to Escape instead of the usual options without taking this penalty

abilities.effect_text: When a holy creature succeeds at a saving throw against this poison, it is immediately cured Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:25] Maximum Duration 5 minutes Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} (1 round) Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} (1 round) Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] with no Perception check to wake up (1 minute)

abilities.effect_text: The smilodon makes a fangs Strike against a creature that's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained]. If the attack hits, the creature is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone]; if the creature is wearing armor with hardness 10 or lower, the armor is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Broken]. If this Strike breaks a creature's armor or damages a creature who is unarmored or wearing broken armor, the creature also takes @Damage[2d6[bleed]]. This Strike doesn't further damage armor that's already broken.

abilities.name: Pounce

abilities.name: Sneak Attack

abilities.name: Quick Capture
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A creature hits or touches the flytrap. Effect The flytrap makes a leaf Strike against the triggering creature. If it hits, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] in that leaf.

abilities.name: Focused Assault
abilities.effect_text: The flytrap attacks a single target with both its two leaves. The flytrap makes one leaf Strike. On a success, the flytrap deals the damage from one leaf Strike plus an additional 1d8 piercing damage for every leaf beyond the first. On a failure, the flytrap deals the damage from one leaf Strike, but it can't use Improved Grab. It deals no damage on a critical failure. This counts toward the flytrap's multiple attack penalty as a number of attacks equal to the number of leaves the flytrap has.

abilities.name: Hungry Flurry
abilities.effect_text: The flytrap makes two leaf Strikes at a -2 penalty, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the flytrap's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all its attacks.

abilities.name: Snow Vision
abilities.effect_text: Snow doesn't impair the snow oni's vision; they ignore @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed]{Concealment} from snowfall.

abilities.name: Bean Panic
abilities.effect_text: Oni are curiously afraid of beans, especially as the seasons begin to change. If a creature Interacts to throw a handful of beans at the oni, the oni becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. While frightened this way, their weakness to spirit damage is increased by 5. The oni then becomes immune to bean panic for 24 hours.

abilities.name: Icy Deflection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The snow oni is targeted by a ranged Strike or spell attack roll that doesn't have the fire trait Effect The snow oni creates a reflective blockade of ice, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack roll. If the attack misses, the snow oni redirects the attack to another creature within 20 feet of the snow oni. The attacker rerolls the attack roll against the new target.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The snow oni can take on the appearance of any Medium or Large humanoid creature. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage bonuses with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Chilling Combo
abilities.effect_text: The snow oni makes two fist Strikes targeting the same creature. If they both hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

abilities.name: Falling Frozen Lightning
abilities.effect_text: The snow oni calls down a bolt of icy lightning, white as fallen snow. The bolt strikes a location within 60 feet, freezing the air into a cloud of snow that fills a @Template[burst|distance:20] and lasts for 1 minute. All creatures within the snow become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and all creatures outside the snow become concealed to creatures within it. A creature that enters the snow or begins its turn there takes @Damage[15[cold]|options:area-damage] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect] save.

abilities.name: Earth Glide

abilities.effect_text: A homunculus has one dose of poison in a reservoir in its head. It can refill this poison from its reserves with an Interact action Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15] Maximum Duration 6 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Enfeebled]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round).

abilities.name: Bardic Lore
abilities.effect_text: Sphinxes are naturally curious, and their love of puzzles and mysteries leads them to gather information on a broad range of topics. Sphinxes have Bardic Lore, a special Lore skill that can be used only to Recall Knowledge, but on any topic.

abilities.name: Claw Rake
abilities.effect_text: The sphinx rears back on their hind legs and makes two claw Strikes at the same target, using the same attack bonus as their highest melee attack. If both attacks deal damage, the target takes extra damage equal to one claw Strike.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.effect_text: The sphinx Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the sphinx began this action @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden], they remain hidden until after the attack.

abilities.name: Riddler's Rune
abilities.effect_text: Once per week, a Sphinx can create a magical symbol as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Rune Trap] ritual. The sphinx usually shapes it to take the form of a written riddle and sets the password to the answer. A creature that gives the wrong answer or tries to pass without answering must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26] save or be affected by one of the following spells, chosen by the sphinx when creating the symbol: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Synaptic Pulse] (5th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Charm] (4th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fear] (4th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Phantom Pain] (4th), @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sleep] (4th). The sphinx learns the identity of any creature that answers the riddle and tends to be friendly to them if they answered correctly.

abilities.name: Swarming Bites

abilities.name: Bramble Jump
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The twigjack is in undergrowth Effect The twigjack scrambles into the undergrowth and instantly teleports to a square of undergrowth within 60 feet. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Luminous Fire
abilities.effect_text: A sprite naturally sheds light like a torch. The sprite can extinguish, rekindle, or change the color of this light by using an action with the concentrate trait. While this light is extinguished, the sprite's Strikes don't deal fire damage, and they can't use their luminous spark Strike.

abilities.name: Dorsal Deflection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The stegosaurus is targeted with a melee attack. Effect The stegosaurus leans its dorsal plates into the attack, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, the stegosaurus Steps after the attack.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Large or smaller, foot, @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

abilities.name: Statuary Aura
abilities.effect_text: 20 feet. Rocks of marble magically arise from the ground in the aura. They protect the bulwark's allies, giving each of them standard @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.Effect: Cover]{Cover}. These stones can be used for Throw Rock. This aura automatically activates at the start of the stone bulwark's first turn in combat and deactivates at the end of combat.

abilities.name: Binding Stone
abilities.effect_text: Any creature hit by the stone bulwark's fist or rock Strike is affected by a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Earthbind] spell.

abilities.name: Inexorable March
abilities.effect_text: The stone bulwark Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging them if they try to stop its movement. A creature can attempt to bar the way by succeeding at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save. On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise it is damaged as if hit by the construct's fist.

abilities.name: Throw Rock
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ThrowRock]

abilities.name: Swat Projectile

If the attack misses and the projectile was made of stone, the giant can throw it back at the attacker as a rock ranged Strike.

abilities.name: Big Swing
abilities.effect_text: The stone giant makes a greatclub Strike. The target is Pushed up to 10 feet on a hit or up to 20 feet on a critical hit. If the target collides with a solid object, it takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen the distance it moved.

abilities.name: Create Boulder
abilities.effect_text: The stone giant molds a boulder from primal earth and throws it as a rock Strike. A creature hit by the Strike must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:26] save or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone].

abilities.name: Earthbound
abilities.effect_text: When not touching solid ground, a stone mauler is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

abilities.name: Crumble
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The stone mauler takes damage from a hostile source while atop rock or earth Effect The stone mauler crumbles into the ground, Burrowing down 15 feet. This Burrowing does not trigger reactions. The stone mauler can't Crumble again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Crumble]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Spike Stones
abilities.effect_text: 5 feet. Spikes of rock rise up from all stone surfaces in the emanation, creating difficult terrain. A creature moving in the terrain takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage for each square of spikes it moves into (a Large or larger creature takes damage only once for each square it moves, even if its space covers multiple squares of spikes). Creatures with the earth trait ignore all effects within the area. The stone mauler can disable or activate this aura using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

abilities.name: Earth Glide
abilities.effect_text: The stone mauler can Burrow through any earthen matter, including rock. When it does so, the stone mauler moves at its full burrow Speed, leaving no tunnels or signs of its passing.

abilities.name: Motion Sense

abilities.name: Split
abilities.effect_text: Whenever a string slime would take slashing damage (if it weren't immune) and has at least 10 HP, it splits into two identical slimes with half the original's HP. One string slime is in the same space as the original, and the other appears in an adjacent unoccupied space. If no adjacent space is unoccupied, move smaller creatures and objects out of the way to make a space or the split is canceled at the GM's discretion.

abilities.name: Tag Team
abilities.effect_text: Requirements another string slime is within 30 feet Effect The slime arcs protoplasm to the other string slime. Creatures in that line take @Damage[3d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:prone] save. abilities.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic
Rejection Vulnerability
abilities.effect_text: As succubi are beings of pure lust, creatures that reject their lust can metaphysically harm them. When a succubus fails a Diplomacy check to Embrace or Request, or when a creature succeeds at its save against a succubus's mental spell or ability, the succubus takes @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage. For 1 hour after causing mental damage to a succubus in this way, a creature can deal @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage to the succubus with a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Demoralize] action incorporating its rejection.

abilities.name: Seductive Presence
abilities.effect_text: 10 feet. Any creature in the aura that could be sexually attracted to a succubus takes a –2 circumstance penalty to checks and DCs to oppose the succubus's mental spells, Deception, and Diplomacy.

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The succubus can take on the appearance of any Small or Medium humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage modifiers with their Strikes, but it might change the damage type their Strikes deal (typically to bludgeoning). @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Embrace
abilities.effect_text: The succubus attempts to [[/act grapple skill=diplomacy]]{Grapple} a creature using their Diplomacy bonus instead of Athletics. If the creature is willing, the succubus automatically succeeds.

abilities.name: Passionate Kiss
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Effect The succubus engages a creature they have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] in an embrace or other act of passion to drain its vital essence. The kiss makes the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} or increases its drained value by 1, to a maximum of 4. The creature takes @Damage[3d6[void]] damage and the succubus regains Hit Points equal to the damage dealt. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:26] save or be affected by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Suggestion] to submit to more actions of passion rather than trying to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape].

abilities.name: Profane Gift
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per day Effect The succubus gives a willing humanoid a profane gift. That creature gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws. As long as the gift persists, the succubus can communicate telepathically with the target at any distance, see through the creature's senses, and target the creature with suggestion through the telepathic link. In addition, the creature uses an outcome one degree of success worse than it rolls on saving throws against the succubus's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Suggestion] spells. A humanoid can't have more than one profane gift at a time, and a succubus can't grant more than one profane gift at a time. Removing the gift requires an atone ritual. The succubus can remove the gift as a free action to give the recipient a curse, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 3} with an unlimited duration. A summoned succubus can't grant a profane gift. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Profane Gift]

As long as a character continues to suffer this curse, its slowed condition can never be reduced below slowed 1. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Curse of Boiling Blood]

abilities.name: Lava Affinity
abilities.effect_text: A tor linnorm can breathe and swim freely while submerged in lava and magma.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike (Tail Only)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.effect_text: @Damage[(3d6+21)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:46|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

abilities.name: Pyroclastic Breath
abilities.effect_text: The tor linnorm expels a @Template[cone|distance:60] of flame and ash dealing @Damage[20d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures within the area (@Check[reflex|dc:46|basic|options:area-effect] save). The linnorm can't use Pyroclastic Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Pyroclastic Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. At the start of the tor linnorm's next turn, the area of the Pyroclastic Breath is covered in thick, scorching smoke that burns both the lungs and eyes, dealing an additional @Damage[10d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:46|basic|options:area-effect] save). A creature that spends an entire round in the smoke with open eyes must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 minute. The smoke dissipates after 1 minute; in strong winds, the smoke dissipates in 5 rounds, and in more powerful winds, it may clear even more quickly.

abilities.name: Slashing Claws
abilities.effect_text: The tor linnorm makes four Strikes with their claws, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the tor linnorm's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the tor linnorm makes all their attacks.

abilities.name: Tor Linnorm Venom
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:44]; Maximum Duration 10 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[8d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[12d6[fire]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} (1 round)

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ImprovedGrab]

abilities.name: Aura of Corruption
abilities.effect_text: 120 feet. Plants near Treerazer twist, deform, and transform into thorny or fungoid parodies of their natural shapes. A living creature in this area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:47] save each round or become partially transformed into plantlike matter. Those who fail this saving throw are treated as if they were plants for the purposes of any effect that particularly harms or inconveniences plant creatures more than other creatures, but do not gain any benefits of being plant creatures. This effect lasts as long as the creature remains within the area of corruption and for 1 minute thereafter. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Aura of Corruption]

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Blackaxe - Owner's Authority
abilities.effect_text: Requirements Treerazer isn't wielding Blackaxe . Effect Treerazer sense the world around Blackaxe as though you were in its location and can use any of your innate spells through the link as if it were the source of the spell. If another creature is wielding Blackaxe, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:50] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 2} until it relinquishes the weapon.

abilities.name: Blackaxe - Owner's Reclamation
abilities.effect_text: Requirements Treerazer isn't wielding Blackaxe . Effect Blackaxe appears in Treerazer's hands, teleporting instantly from its prior location.

abilities.name: Blackaxe - Rejuvenating Deforestation
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per minute. Effect Make a Strike against a living tree with Blackaxe. If it hits, the tree withers to ash and you heal @Damage[250[healing]]{250 Hit Points} and gain the benefit of a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Sound Body] spell.

abilities.name: Defoliation
abilities.effect_text: Treerazer exudes a pulse of sickly green light in a 30-foot-radius emanation. All plants in the area (including creatures under the effect of his aura of corruption) blacken and wither. Non-creature plants immediately wither and die. Plant and fungus creatures take @Damage[20d8[void]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:49|basic] save. A creature that fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed]{Doomed 1} for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 3}. Treerazer can choose to exclude any number of plants or fungi in the area from this effect, and generally does so to preserve twisted and corrupted plants or fungi, or plant and fungus creatures that are allied to his cause. Treerazer can't use Defoliation for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Defoliation]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Dispelling Strike
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Trigger Treerazer hits a creature, object, or spell effect with a weapon Strike or subjects one to Defoliation; Effect Treerazer casts his innate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dispel Magic], targeting the creature he hit with his Strike or one spell affecting that creature.

abilities.name: Staggering Strike
abilities.effect_text: When Treerazer scores a critical hit with a melee attack, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.

abilities.name: Primal Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: primal | innate

abilities.name: Frill Defense
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The rider is targeted with an attack. Requirements A creature must be mounted on the triceratops. Effect The triceratops intercepts the attack with its bony frill. The rider gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Frill Defense]

abilities.name: Lumbering Charge
abilities.effect_text: The triceratops Strides up to 10 feet and then makes a Strike.

abilities.effect_text: A triceratops deals 2d6 extra persistent bleed damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] targets it hits with its horns.

abilities.name: Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Electricity or Fire)
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Regeneration]

abilities.name: Furious Roar
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The troll warleader takes electricity or fire damage Effect The warleader uses their Primordial Roar and, if they're aware of the damage's source, can Stride toward it. If the warleader has persistent fire damage, they attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15] to remove it.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

abilities.name: Primordial Roar
abilities.effect_text: The troll warleader unleashes a bestial roar. Each non-troll creature in a @Template[emanation|distance:100] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:29] save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 1}. Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}. Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3}.

abilities.name: Shed Armor
abilities.effect_text: The warleader cuts their armor loose from their flesh. They immediately heal @Damage[60[healing]]{60 Hit Points} in a surge of regeneration as they grow twisted limbs and malformed faces. Without their armor, the warleader's AC drops to 26 but they gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.All-Around Vision] from the new faces. Putting the armor back on takes 10 minutes, and this ability can't be used again until 1 hour has passed.

abilities.name: Sweeping Axes
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The troll warleader is wielding two battle axes Effect The warleader makes a battle axe Strike against each creature in their reach and the bonus from sweep applies to each attack. These attacks count against their multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks.

abilities.name: Bramble Jump
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The twigjack is in undergrowth Effect The twigjack scrambles into the undergrowth and instantly teleports to a square of undergrowth within 60 feet. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Splinter Spray
abilities.effect_text: The twigjack sprays a barrage of splinters and brambles from its body in a @Template[cone|distance:15], dealing @Damage[4d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic|options:area-effect] save). It can't use Splinter Spray again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Splinter Spray]]{1d4 rounds}.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.effect_text: Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] in the tyrannosaurus's jaws Effect The tyrannosaurus flings the creature into the air up to 10 feet up from its mouth and 20 feet away. The creature falls 25 feet (assuming the tyrannosaurus flings it as high as it can) and takes falling damage accordingly. If the flung creature lands on another creature, the creature it lands on takes the same amount of bludgeoning damage. The creature being landed on can attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:23|basic] save.

abilities.name: Pin Prey
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The tyrannosaurus critically hits a Large or smaller foe with its foot Effect The creature struck by the foot is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Prone] and held in place. As long as the tyrannosaurus doesn't move from its position, the pinned creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed]. A tyrannosaurus gains a +2 circumstance bonus to attack a creature it has pinned in this manner but can only Swallow Whole if that creature is grabbed with its jaws.

abilities.name: Swallow Whole
abilities.effect_text: Medium, @Damage[(3d6+8)[bludgeoning]] damage, Rupture 26 @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.effect_text: Huge or smaller, foot, @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

Assume Form
abilities.effect_text: The ugothol spends 10 minutes reshaping its appearance to take on the shape of any Small or Medium humanoid. It gains a +4 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to pass as that creature.

abilities.name: Blood Nourishment
abilities.effect_text: The ugothol uses its three-pronged tongue to drink the blood of an adjacent @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] creature. The creature gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1}

abilities.name: Compression
abilities.effect_text: When the ugothol successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Squeeze]{Squeezes}, it moves through the tight space at full speed. Narrow confines are not difficult terrain for an ugothol.

abilities.name: Revert Form
abilities.effect_text: Requirements The ugothol is in an assumed form Effect The ugothol resumes its true form. Until the start of its next turn, it gains a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, saving throws, and skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Revert Form]

abilities.name: Sneak Attack
abilities.effect_text: The ugothol deals 1d6 extra precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] creatures.

abilities.name: Animal Empathy
abilities.effect_text: The unicorn has a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows them to communicate with animals. They can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

abilities.name: Ghost Touch
abilities.effect_text: A unicorn's Strikes have the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ghost Touch] property rune.

abilities.name: Powerful Charge
abilities.effect_text: The unicorn Strides up to double its Speed in a straight line and then makes a horn Strike. If the unicorn moved at least 20 feet, it deals an additional 2d6 damage on a hit.

abilities.name: Primal Innate Spells
abilities.effect_text: Tradition: primal | innate

abilities.name: Echolocation (Precise) 20 feet
abilities.effect_text: A bat swarm can use its hearing as a precise sense at the listed range.

abilities.name: Swarm Mind
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwarmMind]

abilities.name: Blood Feast
abilities.effect_text: Each enemy in the bat swarm's space takes @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save). Creatures that fail this save also take @Damage[1[bleed]] damage.

name: Vampire Count
hp_special: coffin restoration, fast healing 7, void healing

abilities.name: Children of the Night
abilities.effect_text: The vampire's presence brings forth creatures of the night to do the master's bidding. These typically include @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Rat Swarm]{Rat Swarms}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Vampire Bat Swarm]{Bat Swarms}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.Wolf]{Wolves}, but can include other creatures. The vampire can give telepathic orders to these creatures as long as they are within 100 feet, but they can't communicate back.

abilities.name: Fast Healing 7
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FastHealing]

abilities.name: Coffin Restoration
abilities.effect_text: Unlike other undead, a vampire isn't destroyed at 0 HP. Instead, it falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious]. If its body rests in its coffin for 1 hour, the vampire gains 1 HP, after which its fast healing begins to function normally.

abilities.name: Mist Escape
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The vampire is reduced to 0 HP. Effect The vampire uses Turn to Mist. They can take move actions to move toward its coffin even though it's at 0 HP. While at 0 HP in this form, the vampire is unaffected by further damage. They automatically returns to its corporeal form, unconscious, if they reaches their coffin or after 2 hours, whichever comes first.

abilities.name: Vampire Vulnerabilities
abilities.effect_text: All vampires possess the following vulnerabilities. Compulsions Vampires are creatures with strange and unknowable compulsions. A typical vampire can't voluntarily cross running water unless they're transported while they hide within their coffin, nor can they enter a private dwelling unless invited in by someone with the authority to do so. At your discretion, vampires might have different compulsions—a pirate vampire might not be able to set foot on solid ground without being invited, for example. The vampire can still be forced to do these things and might be able to overcome their compulsion just as they do their revulsion. Revulsion A vampire can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of brandished garlic or a brandished religious symbol of a deity with a holy sanctification option. To brandish garlic or a religious symbol, a creature must Interact to do so, and it remains brandished for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the vampire involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of their revulsion, they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fleeing] condition, running from the object of their revulsion until they end an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of their revulsion, a vampire can attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} (or 1 hour on a critical success). Stake A wooden stake driven through a vampire's heart drops the vampire to 0 HP and prevents them from healing above 0 HP, even in their coffin. Staking a vampire requires 3 actions and works only if the vampire is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious]. If the stake is removed, the vampire can heal above 0 HP again, and if they're in their coffin, the 1-hour rest period begins once the stake is removed. If the vampire's head is severed and anointed with holy water while the stake is in place, the vampire is destroyed. Sunlight If exposed to direct sunlight, a vampire immediately becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1}. The slowed value increases by 1 each time the vampire ends their turn in sunlight, and the condition ends when they're no longer in sunlight. If the vampire loses all their actions in this way, they're destroyed. Due to their supernatural aversion to light, vampires don't cast shadows or show a reflection in mirrors

abilities.name: Void Healing
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

abilities.name: Change Shape
abilities.effect_text: The vampire transforms into one of its animal forms or back into its normal form. Most vampires can turn into a bat, but some can turn into a different creature, such as a rat or a wolf. Giant Bat Senses echolocation 40 feet, Speed 20 feet, fly 30 feet, Melee fangs +15 Damage 1d8+9 piercing @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

abilities.name: Create Servitor
abilities.effect_text: If a creature dies after being reduced to 0 HP by Drink Blood, the vampire can turn this victim into a vampire servitor by donating some of their own blood to the victim and burying the victim in earth for 3 nights. A vampiric servitor is compelled to obey its creator, but if a vampire controls too many vampiric servitors at once (as determined by the GM), or if the servitor is a higher level than the vampire that created it, strongwilled servitors can free themselves by succeeding at a @Check[will|defense:will] saving throw against the vampire's Will DC.

abilities.name: Dominate
abilities.effect_text: The vampire can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dominate] at will as a divine innate spell. Casting it requires staring into the target's eyes, giving the spell the visual trait (@Check[will|dc:22]). The save DC uses the high spell DC of the vampire's level, and a creature that succeeds is temporarily immune to that vampire's Dominate for 24 hours. Fully destroying the vampire ends the domination, but merely reducing the vampire to 0 HP is insufficient to break the spell.

abilities.name: Drink Blood
abilities.effect_text: Requirement A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious], or willing creature is within the vampire's reach. Effect The vampire sinks its fangs into that creature to drink its blood. This requires an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and is automatic for any of the other conditions. The victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} and the vampire regains @Damage[10[healing]]{10 HP}, gaining any excess HP as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a creature that's already drained doesn't restore any HP to the vampire but increases the victim's drained value by 1, killing the victim when it reaches drained 5. A vampire can also consume blood that's been emptied into a vessel for sustenance, but it gains no HP from doing so. A victim's drained condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires a @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] check and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the drain by 1 after 10 minutes.

abilities.name: Turn to Mist
abilities.effect_text: The vampire turns into a cloud of vapor, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Vapor Form] spell, or back to its normal form. The vampire loses fast healing while in gaseous form. The vampire can remain in this form indefinitely.

abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Grab]

abilities.effect_text: Requirement A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Paralyzed], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious], or willing creature is within the vampire's reach. This requires an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and is automatic for any of the other conditions. The victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} and the vampire regains @Damage[10[healing]]{10 HP}, gaining any excess HP as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a creature that's already drained doesn't restore any HP to the vampire but increases the victim's drained value by 1, killing the victim when it reaches drained 5. A vampire can also consume blood that's been emptied into a vessel for sustenance, but it gains no HP from doing so. A victim's drained condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires a @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] check and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the drain by 1 after 10 minutes.

abilities.name: Steady Spellcasting
abilities.effect_text: If another creature's reaction would disrupt the vampire mastermind's spellcasting action, the vampire attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If the vampire succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

abilities.name: Turn to Mist
abilities.effect_text: The vampire turns into a cloud of vapor, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Vapor Form] spell, or back to its normal form. The vampire loses fast healing while in gaseous form. The vampire can remain in this form indefinitely.

name: Vampire Servitor
