abilities.name: Fast Healing 5
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FastHealing]

abilities.name: Coffin Restoration
abilities.effect_text: Unlike other undead, a vampire isn't destroyed at 0 HP. Instead, it falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious]. If its body rests in its coffin for 1 hour, the vampire gains 1 HP, after which its fast healing begins to function normally.

abilities.name: Vampire Vulnerabilities
abilities.effect_text: All vampires possess the following vulnerabilities. Compulsions Vampires are creatures with strange and unknowable compulsions. A typical vampire can't voluntarily cross running water unless they're transported while they hide within their coffin, nor can they enter a private dwelling unless invited in by someone with the authority to do so. At your discretion, vampires might have different compulsions—a pirate vampire might not be able to set foot on solid ground without being invited, for example. The vampire can still be forced to do these things and might be able to overcome their compulsion just as they do their revulsion. Revulsion A vampire can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of brandished garlic or a brandished religious symbol of a deity with a holy sanctification option. To brandish garlic or a religious symbol, a creature must Interact to do so, and it remains brandished for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the vampire involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of their revulsion, they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fleeing] condition, running from the object of their revulsion until they end an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of their revulsion, a vampire can attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} (or 1 hour on a critical success). Stake A wooden stake driven through a vampire's heart drops the vampire to 0 HP and prevents them from healing above 0 HP, even in their coffin. Staking a vampire requires 3 actions and works only if the vampire is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious]. If the stake is removed, the vampire can heal above 0 HP again, and if they're in their coffin, the 1-hour rest period begins once the stake is removed. If the vampire's head is severed and anointed with holy water while the stake is in place, the vampire is destroyed. Sunlight If exposed to direct sunlight, a vampire immediately becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1}. The slowed value increases by 1 each time the vampire ends their turn in sunlight, and the condition ends when they're no longer in sunlight. If the vampire loses all their actions in this way, they're destroyed. Due to their supernatural aversion to light, vampires don't cast shadows or show a reflection in mirrors

abilities.name: Vanth's Curse
abilities.effect_text: Frequency three times per day Effect The vanth bestows a curse on a creature by touching it with its scythe. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save. Critical Success The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Vanth's Curse for 24 hours. Success The target feels a momentary shudder of doom and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute by the distracting sensation. Failure The target becomes morose and glum as it accepts its own inevitable fate. For 1 hour, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}. Each time the target gains the dying condition, the stupefied condition value increases by 1, to a maximum value of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}. Critical Failure As failure, but the effect is permanent.

abilities.name: Frightful Presence
abilities.effect_text: 60 feet. @Check[will|dc:39|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

abilities.name: Lightning Drinker
abilities.effect_text: Whenever a yamaraj would take electricity damage if not for its immunity, its fast healing increases to 40 on its next turn. During that turn, if it uses Beetle Breath, the beetles deal @Damage[2d12[electricity]]{2d12 additional electricity damage}.

abilities.name: Beetle Breath
abilities.effect_text: The yamaraj breathes a blast of beetles in a @Template[cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[14d8[slashing],4d8[persistent,slashing]|options:area-damage]{14d8 slashing damage and 4d8 persistent slashing damage} to creatures in the area with a @Check[reflex|dc:42|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save. It can't use Beetle Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Beetle Breath]]{1d4 rounds}. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1}. Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2}. Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 3}.

abilities.name: Final Judgment
abilities.effect_text: A yamaraj's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Manifestation] spells are used only to pronounce judgment, typically either to restore a dead or destroyed creature to life, bind a creature to the Boneyard, or banish a creature from the Boneyard.

abilities.name: Shepherd's Touch
abilities.effect_text: A yamaraj's Strikes affect incorporeal creatures with the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ghost Touch] property rune and deal @Damage[3d6[void]] damage to living creatures and @Damage[3d6[vitality]] damage to undead.

abilities.name: Yamaraj Venom
abilities.effect_text: While a creature is clumsy from this poison, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Doomed] with the same value; Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:42] Maximum Duration 10 rounds Stage 1 @Damage[3d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} (1 round) Stage 2 @Damage[5d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} (1 round) Stage 3 @Damage[7d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 3} (1 round)

abilities.name: Snowblind
abilities.effect_text: When @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide]{Hiding}, the yeti is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed] by any snowfall, even if it's not thick enough to make other creatures concealed.

abilities.name: Nightmare Guardian
abilities.effect_text: Yetis gain a +4 status bonus to saves against fear and against spells and abilities that affect dreams. A yeti that falls prey to a supernatural nightmare loses this ability and becomes permanently enraged, gaining a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls and a -1 status penalty to AC.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The yeti is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Undetected] while not in combat, and a creature would observe it. Effect The yeti Strides or Climbs up to half its Speed to a location where it can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide], then Hides. If its new Stealth check result meets or exceeds the triggering creature's Perception DC, the yeti remains hidden.

abilities.name: Arctic Passage
abilities.effect_text: The yeti ignores difficult terrain caused by ice or snow.

abilities.name: Grizzly Arrival
abilities.effect_text: Trigger The yeti hits a creature in the first round of combat and the yeti was @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Hidden] from that creature at the start of combat. Effect Each enemy within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} that witnesses the attack (including the target of the attack) must attempt a @Check[will|dc:23] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}; on a critical failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 4}.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.effect_text: Claw @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

abilities.name: Preserve Prey
abilities.effect_text: Trigger A living creature within 30 feet is reduced to 0 Hit Points Effect The zecui channels corrupt vitality into the triggering creature, which still goes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] but does not gain the dying condition. While that creature is unconscious, the residual energy attempts to counteract any vitality spell healing that creature with a [[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15} counteract modifier.

abilities.name: Dual Stab
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per round Effect The zecui makes two shortsword Strikes against an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] target. These strikes count towards the zecui's multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after the second attack.

abilities.name: Harden Chitin
abilities.effect_text: The zecui fuses much of their chitin into a black metallic shell. They gain resistance 5 to all damage (except mental and spirit) until they next take a move action.

abilities.name: Spit Mucus
abilities.effect_text: A creature hit by the zecui's spit attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] by the larva-infested mucus and stuck to the nearest surface until it [[/act escape dc=25]]{Escapes}. While that creature is immobilized, it is exposed to zecui larvae at the end of each of its turns.

abilities.name: Zecui Larvae
abilities.effect_text: Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:25] Stage 1 visible lumps as the larvae move but no ill effect (1 day) Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 day) Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} (1 day) Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Drained]{Drained 3} and controlled by the zecui larva (1 day) Stage 5 the creature dies and the adult zecui can emerge from the corpse as an Interact action

abilities.name: Circling Attack
abilities.effect_text: The zephyr hawk Flies up to half its Speed, makes two wing Strikes, then Flies up to half its Speed again to return to its original location. The second half of this movement doesn't trigger reactions. Both attacks count toward the zephyr hawk's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after it makes both attacks.

abilities.name: All-Around Vision
abilities.effect_text: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AllAroundVision]

abilities.name: Archon's Protection
abilities.effect_text: Trigger An enemy damages the archon's ally and both are within 15 feet of the archon Effect The ally gains resistance 3 to all damage against the triggering damage and the archon can make a Strike against the enemy.

abilities.name: Behold!
abilities.effect_text: Frequency once per hour; Effect The zoaem's rings and wings move in a complex pattern, mesmerizing creatures in the zoaem's choice of a @Template[emanation|distance:10] or a @Template[burst|distance:5] within 60 feet. Each creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Fascinated] with the zoaem for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 1} (or stunned for 1 round on a critical failure).

abilities.name: Light of Truth
abilities.effect_text: The zoaem shines an intense light of truth, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Revealing Light] (@Check[reflex|dc:17] save) but in a @Template[line|distance:60]. Against creatures affected by this light, the zoaem and their allies gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls and Recall Knowledge checks. The zoaem can't use Light of Truth again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Light of Truth]]{1d4 rounds}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Effect: Light of Truth]
